title: YouTube Video Editor
desc:
I'm looking for a skilled video editor to create informative and educational content for my YouTube channel. The videos are intended for social media and should be polished and professional.

Key Requirements:
- Edit social media content for YouTube
- Informative/educational style
- Professional and polished final product

Ideal Skills and Experience:
- Proficient in video editing software (e.g., Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro)
- Experience with YouTube content
- Strong understanding of informative/educational video styles
- Ability to meet deadlines and communicate effectively
task_type: YouTube Educational Video — auto highlight cut + reframe
mcp_workflow: asset_add_file (client raw footage) -> media_summarize (transcript to find key segments) -> video_create_quick_cut (auto highlight cut) -> video_resize (reframe to 16:9 YouTube + 9:16 Shorts) -> media_enhance_speech (clean narration audio) -> asset_preview_file
inputs: Client's raw educational footage (file/URL)
Target length per video — confirm; brief doesn't state
Deliverable specs (1080p H.264 MP4) — confirm
Channel intro/outro + lower-third text if any
note: Connector auto-cuts highlights, reframes per platform and cleans audio; a human does the informative-style narrative fine-cut, on-screen graphics/B-roll sequencing and final captions.

title: Grow AERI Makhana Instagram France
desc:
Instagram Growth Manager: Launch & Scale Healthy Snack Brand (France)

Project Overview

We are launching a brand-new Instagram account for AERI Makhana (a premium, healthy popped water lily seed snack) targeting the French market. We need an aggressive, creative growth expert to take this account from 0 to a target milestone of 100k genuine French followers.
The strategy must balance hyper-growth with community building. We want real engagement, not empty bot numbers. Because we are a new brand, we are operating on a tight startup budget. We need someone who can maximize organic reach, viral loops, and low-cost/barter collaborations.

Scope of Work (What You Will Do)
1. Profile Setup & Optimization: Complete optimization for the French market (bio, highlights, localized SEO, geo-tagging).
2. Content Creation & Management: Develop a 30-day content calendar. Edit/repurpose our raw assets into highly shareable, viral-potential Reels using trending French audio, aesthetic carousel posts, and interactive Stories.
3. Low-Cost Influencer Outreach: Identify, pitch, and secure barter deals (product in exchange for content) with micro-creators in the French food, fitness, and healthy lifestyle niches.
4. Organic Growth Strategy: Implement high-yield growth tactics (giveaways, community management, viral hooks, and heavy engagement with French healthy-snacking communities).
5. Analytics: Provide weekly reports tracking follower growth, reach, engagement rate, and bio-link clicks.

We will supply: Raw product images, brand colors, guidelines, and raw video footage.

Acceptance Criteria
1. Target Audenced Location: 90%+ of gained followers must be located in France.
2. High Engagement: Maintain a strong engagement rate (saves, shares, comments) to ensure the algorithm favors our content.
3. Brand Integrity: All content must be high-quality, professional, in fluent French, and perfectly aligned with our healthy-snacking identity.

How to Apply (Proposal Requirements)
To be considered, please keep your proposal brief and directly answer the following questions:
1. Going from 0 to 100k is a massive mountain to climb on a budget. What is your specific, realistic strategy to achieve explosive, organic growth for a food brand in France within the first 30–60 days?
2. What style of Reels or content hooks do you find perform best right now in the French healthy-food niche?
3. Do you have an existing network or a proven script for getting French micro-influencers to agree to barter deals?
4. What is your all-inclusive flat monthly rate for this project? (Keep our startup budget constraints in mind).
task_type: Instagram Reels + carousel from raw assets (FR healthy-snack brand)
mcp_workflow: asset_add_file (raw product images + raw video footage) -> video_create_quick_cut (auto highlight cut for Reels) -> video_resize (reframe to 9:16 1080x1920) -> search_design (Express IG carousel template) -> fill_text (French copy) -> image_crop_and_resize (1080x1080 carousel frames) -> asset_preview_file
inputs: Brand's raw product images + raw video footage (supplied)
Brand colours + guidelines (supplied)
French post copy / captions per slide (client to provide)
AERI Makhana logo file
Targets: IG Reels 1080x1920 + carousel 1080x1080
note: Connector produces the Reels (auto-cut+reframe) and template carousels; the growth strategy, French trending-audio choice, influencer outreach and community management are human/non-design work outside the connector.

title: Brand Awareness Flyers & Social Posts
desc:
I’m putting together a cohesive set of visual assets to boost brand awareness and I want them to look equally sharp in print and online. The scope covers three core items:  
• Print-ready flyers and posters that follow my existing colour palette and fonts.  
• AI-generated hero images that align with the overall concept.  
• Social-media-optimised versions of the artwork for Facebook and Instagram, sized correctly for feeds and stories.

You’re free to choose your preferred design software or AI tool (Midjourney, DALL-E, Photoshop Generative Fill, etc.) as long as the final work feels consistent across every format. I’ll supply the brief, logo files and any copy as soon as we start; you’ll handle layout, image generation and final export.

Deliverables I expect at hand-off:  
• High-resolution PDF files ready for print.  
• Layered source files (AI/PSD).  
• Optimised PNG/JPG sets for Facebook and Instagram, including story ratios.

Before sign-off, I’ll need a quick round of revisions to fine-tune colours, placement and any CTA text. If this fits your wheelhouse, let’s talk timing and get rolling.
mcp_workflow: search_design (Express flyer/poster template) -> fill_text (client copy + CTA) -> asset_add_file (logo + hero image) -> document_convert_pdf (print-ready hi-res PDF) -> image_crop_and_resize (FB/IG feed + story ratios) -> asset_preview_file
inputs: Existing colour palette (hex) + fonts
Logo files
Copy + CTA text
Hero image — client-supplied or licensed via Adobe Stock (asset_search); connector cannot generate the AI hero image
Targets: print PDF, FB + IG feed and story sizes
note: The requested AI-generated hero image cannot be made (no text-to-image); supply it from Stock or client. Template fill_text changes copy only; precise brand font/colour need a human in Express.

title: Lead-Generating Real Estate Facebook Posts
desc:
I’m looking for someone who can take over my Facebook feed and turn it into a steady source of qualified real-estate leads. Every week I want to publish a balanced mix of:

• Fresh property listings written in buyer-friendly language and paired with eye-catching images or short reels  
• Bite-sized market insights and trends that position me as the local expert  
• Practical home-improvement tips that keep homeowners engaged until they’re ready to sell or buy  

Your posts should be optimized for Facebook’s current algorithm, include clear calls to action, and reflect a consistent brand voice. Captions, hashtags, basic graphic design, and scheduling in Meta Business Suite are all part of the job. I’ll supply raw listing details, recent stats, and any brand assets you need; you handle the creative spin, formatting, and timely publication.

Acceptance criteria:  
1. A 4-week content calendar (12–15 posts) delivered in Google Sheets.  
2. All graphics sized correctly for Facebook feed.  
3. Captions free of grammar errors and containing at least one CTA that funnels leads to my website or Messenger.  
4. Scheduled posts visible in my Meta queue at least 48 hours before they go live.

If this sounds like something you can execute smoothly, let’s talk timing and next steps.
mcp_workflow: asset_add_file (property photos + agent logo) -> search_design (Express real-estate FB post template) -> fill_text (listing details + CTA) -> image_crop_and_resize (Facebook feed 1200x630) -> asset_preview_file
inputs: Raw listing photos + property details (price, beds, address)
Agent/brokerage logo + brand colours
CTA copy funnelling to website/Messenger
Recent market stats for insight posts
Target: Facebook feed size
note: Connector produces the post graphics via template; the 4-week content calendar, caption copywriting, hashtag strategy and Meta Business Suite scheduling are human/non-connector work. fill_text changes copy only.

title: Social & Print Graphics Bundle
desc:
I’m refreshing my visual presence and need a designer who can take care of everything from online posts to offline collateral. Specifically, I’m looking for:

• Posters and banners ready for both large-format print and digital display  
• Business cards and a versatile, scalable logo that will anchor the whole look  

All artwork should align to one cohesive style, supplied in editable source files (AI/PSD), plus high-resolution PNG, JPG, and press-ready PDF with bleed where relevant. If you normally work in Illustrator, Photoshop, or even Figma for layout previews, that’s perfect—just let me know your process.

Once we agree on a design direction, I’ll need the first round of concepts within a week and final, polished files shortly after revisions. If this sounds like your kind of project, I’m ready to get started right away.
task_type: Social posts + posters/banners + business cards bundle
mcp_workflow: search_design (Express social post / poster / banner / business-card templates) -> fill_text (brand copy) -> asset_add_file (logo + photos) -> document_convert_pdf (press-ready PDF with bleed) -> image_crop_and_resize (IG/FB/LinkedIn sizes) -> asset_preview_file
inputs: Brand logo (or simple wordmark to build from template)
Brand colours + fonts
Copy for each piece
Photos to place
Business card details (name, title, contact)
Targets: IG/FB/LinkedIn + large-format print PDF with bleed
note: Delivered from Express templates; a 'versatile scalable logo' beyond a simple wordmark, and exact brand font/colour matching, need a human in Express/Illustrator. fill_text changes copy only.

title: Drive Product Sales via Social Media
desc:
I’m ready to scale up sales for my product and need someone who can take full control of the social channels that matter most to my audience—Instagram, Facebook, and Twitter. The priority is clear: every piece of work you do should push followers closer to a purchase.

Here’s what I have in mind. You’ll develop a consistent stream of content—images, short-form videos, and sharp text posts—planned around an agreed calendar. Each post should carry a clear call-to-action that directs people to my checkout page or DMs for quick conversions, and you’ll optimise captions, hashtags, and timing so we squeeze the most out of every impression.

I’ll provide product photos, brand guidelines, and current audience insights. From there, I expect you to: 

• Build out a weekly content schedule  
• Design and write the posts (Adobe Suite, Canva, or tools of your choice)  
• Publish at optimal times and manage replies or basic queries within 24 hours  
• Track link clicks, add-to-cart events, and sales so we can see real ROI  
• Refine the approach every week based on performance data pulled from native platform analytics and, if you prefer, Google Analytics or a similar dashboard  

Success looks like a sustained uptick in conversions alongside healthy engagement rates. If you’re confident you can turn social attention into sales, let’s talk strategy and timelines.
mcp_workflow: asset_add_file (product photos + logo) -> image_remove_background (clean product cut-outs) -> search_design (Express promo post template) -> fill_text (CTA / offer copy) -> image_crop_and_resize (IG 1080x1080, FB, Twitter) -> asset_preview_file
inputs: Product photos
Brand guidelines + logo
Offer/CTA copy per post (link to checkout/DM)
Audience insights (informs copy)
Targets: Instagram, Facebook, Twitter
note: Connector produces the post graphics; the content calendar, scheduling, reply management, ROI/analytics tracking and copywriting are human work. fill_text changes copy only.

Looking forward to collaborating with a creative professional!

inputs: Raw podcast video + reel footage
Brand logo + colours
Post copy for IG/FB

title: Social Media Graphics
desc:
I want to refresh my Facebook, Instagram, and Twitter feeds with a consistent, eye-catching look. Specifically, I need three sets of assets for each platform:

• Scroll-stopping post images that match my brand voice and current campaigns  
• Vertical story images formatted for each network’s recommended dimensions  
• High-performing ad banners ready for paid promotions

Please design with current platform specs in mind and supply layered source files (PSD or AI) alongside ready-to-publish PNG/JPEG exports. I’ll share my logo, colour palette, and sample messaging once we start. Two quick revision rounds should be plenty; the goal is a polished, cohesive package I can roll out immediately.
mcp_workflow: search_design (Express post / story / ad-banner templates) -> fill_text (campaign messaging) -> asset_add_file (logo + photos) -> image_crop_and_resize (FB/IG/Twitter feed + vertical story + banner sizes) -> asset_preview_file
inputs: Logo + colour palette
Sample messaging/copy per asset
Photos/imagery
Targets: FB, IG, Twitter — feed posts, vertical stories, ad banners
note: Three asset types built from templates; PSD/AI layered source and precise brand styling need a human. fill_text changes copy only.

title: Graphic Design Aligned with Brand Standards
desc:
I’m looking for a skilled designer who can create fresh visual assets while staying strictly inside my existing brand guidelines. You’ll receive the full style guide—logo lock-ups, colour palette, typography rules, imagery tone, even sample layouts—and every piece you produce must fit seamlessly within that framework.

The exact formats are still flexible. I may need anything from eye-catching social posts and web banners to printable one-pagers or presentation slides, so versatility is important. What matters most is that each design feels cohesive with the rest of the brand and is delivered on time.

Please share:
• Examples where you worked under established brand rules  
• Your preferred tools (Illustrator, Photoshop, InDesign, Figma, etc.)  
• Typical turnaround for first drafts and revisions  

Final artwork should arrive as fully editable source files plus export-ready PNG, JPG or PDF, named and organised for easy hand-off. Let me know how you would tackle the first assignment and we can get started right away.
task_type: On-brand assets (social posts / web banners / one-pagers / slides)
mcp_workflow: search_design (Express social post / banner / flyer / presentation template) -> fill_text (client copy) -> asset_add_file (logo lock-ups + imagery from style guide) -> document_convert_pdf (printable one-pager PDF) -> image_crop_and_resize (per channel) -> asset_preview_file
inputs: Full brand style guide (logo lock-ups, palette, type rules, sample layouts)
Copy for the first assignment
Imagery matching the brand tone
Exact format of first piece — confirm (social / banner / one-pager / slide)
note: Connector fills brand content into templates; strict pixel-perfect adherence to the style guide (exact fonts/spacing) needs a human in Express. fill_text changes copy only.

title: Clean Social Promo Video Edits
desc:
I’m looking to turn a regular stream of raw footage into polished short-form content that’s ready to publish across Instagram, YouTube Shorts, TikTok, and Twitter. Every cut should feel crisp, uncluttered, and on-brand—think clean, minimalistic pacing rather than flashy transitions.

Here’s what I need from you:

Trim and arrange clips to tell the core message in 15–60 seconds.

Add simple lower-thirds or captions where context helps, always sticking to a minimal aesthetic.

Colour-correct and balance audio so the final export looks consistent on mobile screens.

Deliver vertical (9:16) versions, plus occasional horizontal masters for YouTube.

Provide project files or a reusable template so I can request quick tweaks down the line.

BIG BONUS: Do you own a Mac?
Since this product is a private AI agent built natively for macOS, having a Mac is a massive plus. If you have one, we will give you full access to the product so you can run it locally on your machine. This allows you to not only edit supplied footage but actually test the product, discover unique workflows, and capture your own raw screen-recordings to test new video ideas.

I’ll supply the initial footage, brand colours, fonts, and reference edits. If you work in Premiere Pro, Final Cut, or DaVinci Resolve, that’s perfect—just keep the workflow organised.

Turnaround on the first video will be our test run; once that’s approved, we’ll roll into a steady schedule. If you thrive on keeping things clear, cohesive, and scroll-stopping without overdoing the effects, let’s get started.
mcp_workflow: asset_add_file (raw footage) -> video_create_quick_cut (trim to 15-60s core message) -> video_resize (9:16 vertical + 16:9 YouTube master) -> media_enhance_speech (balance/clean audio) -> asset_preview_file
inputs: Raw footage stream (files/URLs)
Brand colours + fonts (for lower-thirds)
Reference edits for pacing
Targets: vertical 9:16 (IG/Shorts/TikTok/Twitter) + occasional horizontal YouTube master, 15-60s
note: Connector trims to the core message, reframes per platform and balances audio; a human adds the lower-thirds/captions, minimal-aesthetic colour grade and reusable template.

title: Instagram Video Content Creator
desc:
I need fresh, scroll-stopping videos made specifically for my Instagram account—no Facebook or Twitter assets, just pure Instagram content. The task is to plan, craft and hand over short vertical clips that fit my brand and encourage engagement.

What I expect from each post:
• A simple concept outline approved before you edit  
• Final video in 1080×1920, up to 60 seconds, ready to publish as a Reel or feed video  
• On-screen text, captions and royalty-free audio where it helps tell the story  
• A quick caption plus 5–10 relevant hashtags  

I’ll share my branding guidelines, previous posts and any product images you might need. Please deliver the finished MP4s through a shared drive and allow one revision round per clip. Once the first sample meets the criteria we can switch to a steady flow of new videos.
mcp_workflow: asset_add_file (raw clips + product images) -> video_create_quick_cut (cut to <=60s reel) -> video_resize (reframe to 1080x1920) -> media_enhance_speech (clean audio) -> asset_preview_file
inputs: Raw clips + product images
Branding guidelines + previous posts for style
Concept outline per clip (client-approved)
Royalty-free audio choice
Target: 1080x1920 MP4, <=60s, one revision/clip
note: Connector cuts and reframes to spec and cleans audio; a human adds on-screen text/captions, royalty-free audio sync and the concept storytelling.

title: Canva Social Media Design Work”
desc:
I need an eye-catching Instagram post created directly in Canva. The goal is to stop the scroll with clean typography, on-brand colours and smart use of imagery, all while keeping text within Instagram’s safe zones.  

I will supply the copy, brand palette and any reference photos as soon as we start; you weave them into a polished layout that feels fresh and professional. I prefer that you work inside Canva so I can easily tweak future versions myself.

Deliverables

I’m happy to answer any sizing or brand guideline questions up front so the first draft is already close to final. If this turns out well, I have a steady stream of posts that need the same treatment.

Brand palette
Reference photos

note: Client wants an editable Canva file specifically; the connector delivers an equivalent Express template + exports, not a native Canva link, and fill_text changes copy only (font/colour tweaks need a human).

I’m revamping my brand’s presence on Facebook, Instagram, and Twitter and need a cohesive set of graphics that look sharp on every feed. The job covers everything visual for these three platforms—profile pictures, engaging post images, and eye-catching cover or header photos—each sized and optimized to current platform specifications.

Consistency across channels is key, so the colour palette, fonts, and overall style should align seamlessly. If you work in Adobe Illustrator, Photoshop, or even Canva, that’s perfect; just be sure the final files are editable so I can tweak copy or swap photos later if needed.

Deliverables

• Post image templates ready for quick text/photo swaps  
• Cover or header photos formatted to each site’s latest guidelines  
• Source files (AI/PSD or layered Canva links) plus exported PNG/JPG versions

I’ll provide my logo, brand colours, and any reference imagery as soon as we kick off. Let me know your turnaround time and a quick outline of your creative process so we can get started right away.
mcp_workflow: search_design (Express profile / post / cover templates) -> fill_text (brand copy) -> asset_add_file (logo + reference imagery) -> image_crop_and_resize (per-platform profile, post, cover/header sizes) -> asset_preview_file
inputs: Logo + brand colours
Reference imagery
Any post copy

note: Profile/post/cover set built from templates; editable AI/PSD source and exact brand styling need a human. fill_text changes copy only.

title: Tech-Focused Social Media Graphics
desc:
I’m looking for a creative partner who can give our feeds a unified, unmistakably tech-driven look and feel. The objective is simple: every post should reinforce our brand identity and grow awareness among our audience.  

The core of the work is designing eye-catching, on-brand visuals for Instagram, Facebook, Twitter and TikTok. Think clean lines, modern type, subtle gradients and the kind of subtle motion or micro-interactions that resonate with a tech-savvy crowd. Each graphic needs to be sized correctly for its platform while retaining a consistent aesthetic across all four channels.  

To keep collaboration smooth, here’s what I need from you:  
• Concept and mood board that captures the tech theme before full production  
• Platform-specific templates (static and, where it adds value, short animations) delivered in editable source files and ready-to-post exports  
• A concise style guide outlining colors, fonts and usage rules so any future pieces stay on brand  
• Two rounds of revisions per asset to fine-tune details without slowing momentum  

If you’re comfortable scheduling the finished posts or advising on optimal posting cadence, that’s a welcome bonus, but the primary deliverable is stellar graphics that elevate our brand presence. Let’s make our social channels look as innovative as the technology we build.
mcp_workflow: create_firefly_board (tech-theme mood board from supplied assets) -> search_design (Express tech social template) -> fill_text (copy) -> asset_add_file (logo + imagery) -> animate_design (simple motion/micro-interaction) -> image_crop_and_resize (per platform) -> asset_preview_file
inputs: Brand logo + existing assets for mood board
Copy per post
Brand colour/gradient + font preferences
Targets: Instagram, Facebook, Twitter, TikTok — static + short animations
note: Mood board from existing assets + templated posts + animate_design for simple motion; the bespoke style guide and exact gradient/type system need a human. fill_text changes copy only.

title: Future-Focused Logo & Social Graphics
desc:
I’m preparing to launch a new initiative called “For our future” and I need a visual identity that feels fresh, optimistic, and memorable. I don’t have any existing brand guidelines, so I’m looking for a designer who can define the look and feel right from the start and show how it extends across key social platforms.

What I’m looking for in your submission:
• A primary logo delivered in editable vector format (AI/SVG) plus PNG/JPG exports.  
• A complementary color palette and suggested typography that capture the forward-looking spirit of the name.

If you’ve mastered Canva’s advanced features—custom templates, animation, brand kits—and can comfortably shift between logo ideation, Instagram carousels and product label layouts, we’ll work well together. Please share a small portfolio or sample links created in Canva, mention your typical turnaround time for a simple post vs. a more complex piece (like a multi-page brochure), and let me know when you can start. 

Looking forward to collaborating and producing standout visuals that keep my clients smiling.

title: Casual Social Media Posts
desc:
I run channels on YouTube and TikTok and need a creative partner who can take raw clips, brainstorm angles, and turn them into scroll-stopping, casually toned posts that feel native to each platform. The job is a mix of content ideation and hands-on video editing: you’ll cut footage into vertical formats, add captions or on-screen text, weave in trending audio, and package everything with a hook that keeps viewers watching to the end.

You’ll receive loose briefs or rough footage from me; your task is to polish them into ready-to-publish posts, suggest titles and hashtags, and deliver final files in platform-friendly resolutions. Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut, CapCut, or any comparable tool is fine as long as the result meets current YouTube Shorts and TikTok specs.

Deliverables for each post
• Edited vertical video (MP4, 1080×1920, under 60 s)  
• Captions burned in and a caption file (.srt)  
• Suggested title, description, and three to five hashtags  

I’m aiming for an upbeat, conversational vibe that feels authentic rather than corporate, so creativity and an eye for trends are essential. Share links to two or three short-form videos you’ve produced that capture this tone, and let me know your typical turnaround time. I’m keen to start as soon as I find the right fit.
mcp_workflow: asset_add_file (raw clips) -> media_summarize (find best moments + transcript for captions) -> video_create_quick_cut (cut to <60s) -> video_resize (1080x1920) -> media_enhance_speech (clean audio) -> asset_preview_file
inputs: Rough footage / loose briefs
Trending audio choice (licensed)
Casual/upbeat tone direction
Target: MP4 1080x1920 <60s + burned captions + .srt + suggested title/hashtags
note: Connector cuts, reframes, cleans audio and the transcript seeds an .srt; burned-in captions styling, trending-audio sync, hook crafting and titles/hashtags are a human finish.

title: Minimalist Logo & Social Media Kit
desc:
I need a fresh, minimalist brand identity built around a new logo. The logo is my top priority, and it must be clean, memorable, and fully scalable. Alongside the logo, I also want matching creative assets for my online presence so every touch-point feels consistent and professional.

Here’s exactly what I’d like delivered:  
• Primary logo in vector (AI, SVG) and raster (PNG, JPG) formats, plus dark-light and square variations  
• Coordinated designs for social media posts, banners, posters, and YouTube thumbnails that echo the logo’s minimalist look  
• Source files for each item so I can update text or imagery later  
• A brief visual guide showing safe-zone, typography, and color specs

Style & direction  
Minimalist is non-negotiable; think clean lines, clever negative space, and no unnecessary ornaments. I’m open on color and happy to discuss monochrome, muted, or bold palettes once you show initial drafts.

Practical notes  
– Please use professional tools such as Adobe Illustrator and Photoshop (or equivalent) so vector files remain editable.  
– Deliver RGB versions for web and CMYK versions for print.  
– Final artwork should be high-resolution and neatly organized into logical layers or artboards.

If this aligns with your expertise in branding and social media design, I look forward to seeing your concept sketches and timeline.

mcp_workflow: search_design (Express minimalist wordmark-logo template) -> fill_text (brand name) -> font_recommend -> image_vectorize -> document_render_vector (AI/SVG + PNG/JPG, RGB + CMYK) -> search_design (Express social/banner/poster/thumbnail templates) -> fill_text (copy) -> asset_preview_file

Palette direction (monochrome/muted/bold — TBD after drafts)
Copy for social/banner/poster/thumbnail
Deliverables: logo AI/SVG + PNG/JPG (dark/light/square), matching social kit, RGB + CMYK

title: Final Exit Visa Story Cover
desc:
I’m promoting a Final Exit Visa service to Bangladeshi expatriates living in Saudi Arabia and I need a single 1080 × 1920 Instagram-Story-sized cover that will also double as the thumbnail for my Facebook ad video. The design must instantly convey safe, premium travel from Saudi Arabia to Bangladesh while looking clean, trustworthy, and scroll-stopping.

Visual direction  
• Emphasise an airplane and a passport in the composition; an airport backdrop can support the concept if it doesn’t clutter the frame.  
• Work in rich yet balanced colours that feel professional rather than overly flashy.  
• Use stylish Bangla typography for the three copy lines exactly as written:  
  ১. ফাইনাল একজিট ভিসায় দেশে যেতে চান?  
  ২. আউটপাস / ফাইনাল এ

Practical requirements  
• Canvas: 1080 × 1920 px (vertical).  
• The finished graphic must look razor-sharp both as a static story slide and as the freeze-frame cover of the video.  
• Supply the layered, fully editable source file—PSD or AI is fine—as well as a ready-to-use high-resolution export (PNG or JPG).  
• Turnaround is urgent; I need first draft concepts quickly and final delivery as soon as approved.

If this sounds clear, let me know how soon you can show an initial draft and I’ll share any brand colours or logos you may need.

mcp_workflow: asset_search (Adobe Stock: airplane, passport, airport) -> asset_license_and_download_stock -> asset_add_file (client logo) -> search_design (Express IG story template) -> fill_text (Bangla copy lines) -> image_remove_background (isolate plane/passport for composition) -> image_crop_and_resize (1080x1920) -> asset_preview_file

title: Follower-Focused Social Media Promotion
desc:
The objective is clear: I want to grow a real, engaged audience on Facebook, Instagram, and Twitter. To achieve that, I’ll need a consistent flow of fresh content—images, short-form videos, and punchy text posts—paired with smart scheduling, eye-catching design, and daily community interaction.

Here is what I expect delivered:

• Hashtag, caption, and CTA suggestions aimed at follower growth  
• Weekly progress report with follower, reach, and engagement metrics pulled from Facebook Insights, Instagram Insights, and Twitter Analytics

Acceptance criteria  
• Minimum 10% follower increase across all three platforms within the first month  
• All content meets platform specs and is approved at least three days before publishing  
• Reports arrive on time and reflect data directly from platform dashboards

If you have a proven track record in organic growth, know your way around paid boosts when necessary, and can keep a friendly, brand-appropriate voice, let’s get started right away.

We run a high volume of Facebook ads and social content for our brand and for our merchants, and we’re looking for a marketing designer who can turn ideas into scroll-stopping creatives that actually convert. Check out the company here: https://franchise.flashdelivery.com/ **Role Overview** You will design and edit creatives for: - Our Facebook / Instagram ads - Our own Facebook page - Our merchants’ Facebook pages Then you’ll post and schedule them using our in-house software. This is a production-heavy, performance-focused role with **uncapped commission linked to results** . **What You’ll Do** - Design static image and carousel creatives for Facebook / Instagram ads - Edit short-form videos for ads and organic posts (1:1, 4:5, 9:16) - Create and post content on multiple merchants’ Facebook pages using our internal tools - Adapt designs to different store brands while following our guidelines - Turn marketing angles and hooks into clear, high-converting creatives - Produce multiple variations of winning concepts for testing - Collaborate with the marketing team to double down on what’s working **Requirements** - 2+ years of graphic design / marketing design experience - Strong portfolio showing ad creatives and social media work - Confident in Adobe Suite and/or Figma plus a video editor (Premiere Pro, Final Cut, CapCut, etc.) - Experience editing short-form content for Facebook / Instagram / TikTok - Organized, fast, and able to hit deadlines without hand-holding - Good written English and attention to detail **Compensation** - Pay: **£2,000 – £3,000 per month** (depending on Results) - **Uncapped performance commission** based on campaign results and targets - Room to grow responsibility and earnings as we scale **How to Apply** To be considered, you **must** send: 1. Your CV 2. A **Loom video (2–5 minutes)** walking through 3–5 of your best ad / social designs or edits - Show the actual files or finished posts - Briefly explain the goal of each piece and your role 3. Links or files of the work you show in the Loom (Google Drive / portfolio link is fine) Applications **without** a Loom walkthrough of your work will not be reviewed.

I also create broader business and investment content for social media across Instagram, LinkedIn, and YouTube. Needs clean cutting, audio balancing, intro and outro, captions, and basic graphics where appropriate. The target audience is business owners and investors, so the edit should feel credible and polished rather than flashy. Key things I want: - Punchy cuts and good pacing to keep attention - Clean captions, well placed and readable - Zoom cuts and punch-ins where they add energy - Consistent style across episodes so the brand looks intentional Volume and Timeline Initially 2 to 4 podcast episodes, with 4 edited for launch date. Turnaround of 5 to 7 days per episode is ideal. I am looking for an ongoing working relationship with the right person, not a one-off. What I Am Looking For - Portfolio showing video podcast or video edits specifically - Experience creating short-form clips optimised for social media - Good communicator who can work independently without handholding - Consistent and reliable on deadlines How to Apply Send a short message with a link to 2 or 3 examples of relevant past work. title: Create 4-Card Facebook / Instagram Carousel Ad for Personalised Wedding Star Map Product
desc: ** Please note that anyone calling me will be immediately deleted from the potential candidates. We do not want people calling about this. Please contact us via Upwork. I am looking for a graphic designer to create a 4-card carousel ad for Facebook / Instagram retargeting for my art business The product is a personalised star map showing the exact stars from a chosen date and location, commonly purchased for weddings, anniversaries, and meaningful gifts. The style should feel: Elegant Emotional Premium Clean and modern Suitable for conversion-focused social media advertising The carousel will contain 4 separate square cards (1080 x 1080 preferred). Card Structure Card 1 – Finished Emotional Product Show a beautiful finished framed star map in a bedroom or elegant home setting. Suggested text: A Wedding Gift That Means Something This card should immediately create emotional appeal. Card 2 – Exact Stars From Your Chosen Night Show the star map design clearly. Suggested text: Exact Stars From Your Chosen Night This should visually explain that the stars are generated from a real date. Card 3 – Personalised Names, Date & Location Show a close-up of personalisation details. Suggested text: Personalised Names, Date & Location The text should feel elegant and easy to read. Card 4 – Proof Within 48 Hours + Tweaks Until Happy This card is important for trust and conversion. title: Senior Production Designer — High-Volume Retail and E-Commerce (Long-Term)
desc: We are a Canadian brand and creative agency looking for a reliable, experienced production designer to join us as a long-term subcontract partner on a retail client engagement. This is not conceptual work. This is structured, brief-driven production at high volume. If you are fast, consistent, brand-disciplined, and comfortable working within tight guidelines on a repeatable basis, this role is built for you. --- **What the work looks like** You will receive creative briefs from our team with clear direction, approved brand assets, and defined specifications. Your job is to execute accurately and efficiently across a range of digital and print formats. Asset types include: - Email headers and banners - Paid social and display ads - Organic social posts and stories - E-commerce homepage tiles, hero banners, and product pages - In-store signage and retail graphics - New product launch assets across multiple tiers Volume runs up to 600 assets per month across approximately 40 briefs. Work is predominantly static design with resizing of master designs into channel-specific dimensions. --- **What we need from you** - Strict adherence to existing brand guidelines. Consistency across every asset is non-negotiable. - Accurate resizing and exporting across all required formats and dimensions. - Delivery of production-ready files and editable working files in required formats and naming conventions. - Standard turnaround of 2 to 4 weeks on most briefs. - Availability for occasional 24 to 48 hour rush turnarounds when required. - Clear, responsive communication with our internal team. --- **You are a fit if you have:** - A strong portfolio showing retail, e-commerce, or consumer brand production work - Demonstrated experience with high-volume, multi-format asset production - Expert proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite, specifically Photoshop, Illustrator, and InDesign - Experience working within strict brand guidelines on behalf of a client or agency - Top Rated or Top Rated Plus status on Upwork - North American time zone or significant overlap --- **What this is not** This is not a branding or concept role. We handle creative direction and strategy. We need a production partner who executes that direction with precision and speed. If you are looking for conceptual freedom, this is not the right fit. --- **Engagement details** This is a long-term subcontract position tied to an ongoing client engagement. We are looking for someone who wants consistent, predictable volume over time, not one-off projects. We will start with a paid test brief of approximately 10 assets to assess fit before committing to the full engagement. --- **To apply** Please include: - Portfolio samples showing retail, e-commerce, or high-volume production work - A brief note on your experience with brand-guideline-driven production - Your hourly rate - Your typical availability and time zone
task_type: High-volume retail/e-com master-design resizing across channels
mcp_workflow: asset_add_file (approved master designs + brand assets) -> image_crop_and_resize (channel-specific dimensions: email header, paid-social, display, e-com hero/tile, signage) -> document_convert_pdf (print-ready where needed) -> asset_preview_file

Briefs with exact target dimensions per channel (client supplies ~40 briefs)
Channels: email headers/banners, paid social + display ads, organic posts/stories, e-com homepage tiles/hero banners/product pages, in-store signage
Required export formats + file-naming conventions
Volume ~600 assets/month

title: Digital Designer Needed for Luxury Medical Aesthetics Brand Rebrand Execution
desc: Why This Role Matters I recently invested in some of the most advanced technologies in medical aesthetics and began rebuilding our website and marketing systems. During that process, I realized something critical: For 15 years, I have built this business without a formal brand system—relying on instinct and what felt right visually. Now, I am building that foundation properly. This role is about translating that brand into a complete, cohesive digital experience. At this stage, I have paused all marketing so everything can relaunch together—refined, aligned, and intentional. The Opportunity We are seeking a high-level designer / digital creative partner to bring this brand to life across all platforms. This is not a basic design role. I am looking for someone with: A strong visual eye Refined design taste The ability to execute a luxury, clinical aesthetic with precision Overall Direction forever young is a high-end, results-driven skin clinic focused on advanced technologies and medical-grade skincare. Brand direction: Clean, modern, minimal Clinical and results-driven Elevated and luxurious (not decorative) Focused on real results (not overly edited imagery) About the Business forever young – advanced laser skin rejuvenation 15+ years established 20,000+ clients 1,500+ Google reviews 4.8–4.9 star rating Multiple industry awards Based in Edmonton Technology & Brand Positioning We have intentionally built our clinic around collaboration with some of the most advanced technologies and physician-grade skincare brands available globally. This is a technology-driven, results-focused environment — not a traditional spa setting. Core Technology Sciton TriBrid Platform (Halo, BBL,Moxi laser, MicroLaserPeel) * NEW TECHNOLGOY Thermage Clear + Brilliant Sylfrim X Rf Microneedling * NEW TECHNOLGOY Cynosure Clarity II * NEW TECHNOLGOY Cynosure Elite iQ HydraFacial Medical-Grade Skincare ZO Skin Health SkinCeuticals Vivier Pharma Colorescience EltaMD Jane Iredale Latisse Positioning: Our results come from the combination of technology + skincare. This is what the design must communicate. 1. Website Design (Primary Focus) Full redesign that: Feels clean, modern, and easy to navigate Uses high-quality imagery (clinic, treatments, technology, products) Communicates a large service offering without clutter Key Pages: Home (rebrand + positioning) Laser & Skin Treatments Aesthetic / Spa Services/Salon Packages & Specials Group / Event Bookings Meet the Team (very important) Gift Cards Reviews & Awards Contact / Book Consultation Observ Skin Analysis (key feature) 2. Email Marketing Design 2–3 campaigns per month Promotions, education, product features, events Looking for: Clean, structured templates Strong readability Fully aligned with brand 3. Social Media Design System We are video-heavy. You will create: Reel covers Branded video endings Story templates Goal: Clean, cohesive, recognizable feed Minimal and refined — not over-designed 4. Digital Service Menus & Client Materials Aesthetic / hair menus Group booking packages Laser & skin treatments Skincare guides Full master menu Used across: Website Client communication (Weave) Consultations What I’m Looking For (Non-Negotiable) Strong design portfolio (this is critical) Experience in luxury / medical / high-end brands Ability to execute a clinical + modern aesthetic High attention to detail (spacing, typography, layout) Understanding of UX and conversion design Ability to take direction and refine Working Style I will be involved in direction and feedback Collaborative process This will likely become an ongoing relationship, not a one-time project. Important I am not looking for someone to create a brand. I am looking for someone who can: Interpret a brand at a high level Execute it beautifully and consistently Elevate it across all digital platforms To Apply Please include: Portfolio (must show strong layout + branding work) Website design examples Any experience with luxury / medical aesthetics brands Important: To confirm you have read this posting in full, start your application with: REBRAND – followed by one sentence on why your design style fits this role.

title: Digital Marketing & Executive Support Coordinator Remote
desc: Role Overview The client is seeking a highly organized and proactive Digital Marketing & Executive Support Coordinator to provide direct support to the Managing Director across website management, product content updates, SharePoint administration, marketing collateral, social media, digital organization, and general business administration. This role serves as a key behind-the-scenes support function, ensuring that business operations, product information, marketing materials, and digital platforms remain accurate, current, and professionally maintained. The successful candidate will work closely with the Managing Director and internal travel team. The ideal person will be technically capable, detail-oriented, self-motivated, and comfortable managing a diverse range of digital, marketing, and administrative responsibilities. This multifaceted role combines WordPress website management, Flatsome/UX Builder content updates, SharePoint administration, supplier and product updates, marketing collateral creation, social media support, digital organization, and general business administration. Key Responsibilities 1. Executive Support Provide day-to-day administrative and operational support to the Managing Director. Assist with business projects, marketing initiatives, supplier communications, and internal administration. Prepare, format, and update documents, spreadsheets, reports, and business resources. Maintain action lists, monitor outstanding tasks, and help ensure projects progress to completion. Assist with email drafting, document formatting, file management, and general coordination 2. Website & WordPress Management Update and maintain company websites using WordPress. Manage website content using Flatsome and UX Builder. Create, edit, and maintain resort pages, holiday package pages, wedding pages, landing pages, and general website content. Upload and format images, PDFs, flyers, and promotional materials. Perform basic website modifications using HTML and CSS. Review website functionality, including links, formatting, page layouts, and mobile responsiveness. Implement basic SEO updates, including: Page titles Meta descriptions Image alt text Internal linking Identify outdated content, broken links, formatting issues, and missing information, escalating concerns to the Managing Director. Ensure all website content remains accurate, current, and aligned with brand standards. 3. SharePoint Intranet & Product Information Management Update and maintain product information within Microsoft SharePoint. Upload, organize, and manage supplier updates, resort information, rate sheets, product flyers, and training materials. Ensure internal product information remains current and accessible for the travel consultant team. Create and update product summaries, supplier notes, and reference documentation. Maintain consistency between website content, SharePoint resources, and marketing collateral. Ensure product information is clearly organized and easily accessible. Support version control and digital file management across SharePoint and OneDrive. 4. Supplier & Product Administration Review supplier and resort updates and convert them into clear website, intranet, and marketing collateral updates. Maintain accurate product information across both internal and external platforms. Update offers, resort inclusions, package details, supplier notes, and product documentation. Support the Managing Director with supplier-related administration and communications. Help ensure the travel team has access to accurate and up-to-date product information. 5. Marketing Collateral Development Create, update, and maintain marketing materials, including: Wedding flyers Resort flyers Holiday package flyers Agent flyers Client-facing documents Product update sheets Promotional PDFs Internal reference materials Additional responsibilities include: Updating existing templates and creating new collateral as required. title: Luxury Fashion Brand Strategist & Instagram Launch Creative Needed
desc: Luxury Fashion Instagram Creative / Brand Launch Support Needed for Modern Registry Wedding Brand I am launching a premium fashion-led brand focused on registry weddings and intimate marriages. This is not a traditional bridal brand. The brand is for women who want to be married, not plan a wedding. The concept centres around modern, elevated outfits and complete looks for registry offices, city ceremonies, and intimate weddings. The aesthetic is refined, minimal, elegant, quietly luxurious, and fashion-led rather than “bridal” in the traditional sense. The focus is on: - beautifully considered outfits - some wearable pieces beyond the wedding day - simplicity and refinement with pieces that are ‘extra’ - modern femininity - calm, elevated visuals I am looking for someone to help BUILD and ESTABLISH the Instagram presence of the brand from the ground up. This is not simply a scheduling or posting role. I am specifically looking for someone with: - exceptional aesthetic taste - strong fashion/luxury visual understanding - experience with premium female-focused brands - editorial or cinematic content direction - organic Instagram growth experience - strong understanding of modern social media storytelling I do NOT want: - generic social media management - Canva-style marketing graphics - loud or trend-heavy content - highly commercial or sales-heavy branding - fast-fashion aesthetics - corporate social media styles I want the brand to feel: - elevated - intentional - modern - emotionally resonant - aspirational without being loud I also want the brand to feel like a community for women who resonate with a more intimate, modern approach to marriage. The Instagram presence should feel emotionally connected, relatable, aspirational, and culturally relevant, not just visually beautiful. I want women to feel understood when they come across the brand. The content should create a sense of belonging for women who value marriage and commitment, but do not connect with the pressure, scale, or expectations of traditional weddings. What I would initially like support with: • Helping shape the visual direction of the Instagram page • Establishing the tone and world of the brand online • Launch strategy and positioning • Planning the first 9–18 posts • Reel concepts and content direction • Moodboards and visual references • Feed aesthetic and layout • Organic growth strategy • Brand storytelling • Caption tone and messaging • Photography and styling direction • Helping the brand feel cohesive and premium from launch I would love someone who understands fashion and visual identity deeply, not just social media posting. The ideal person will understand: - quiet luxury aesthetics - restraint and simplicity - elevated female fashion branding - how to create desire and emotional connection through visuals - modern Instagram and TikTok culture for premium brands Please send: - portfolio - examples of Instagram pages or brands you’ve worked on - fashion/luxury/lifestyle work examples - any relevant moodboards or creative direction examples - links to content you feel aligns with this aesthetic This role will begin project-based but could become long-term for the right person. Taste and aesthetic alignment are extremely important for this project.

title: Brand Identity Designer for Luxury Pearl Jewelry Brand (ZELANI)
desc: I'm building ZELANI — a minimalist pearl jewelry brand rooted in a Mediterranean coastal aesthetic. Think warm natural light, sea textures, linen, stone. The feeling of a villa in Bodrum or a weekend in Capri — elevated, sensory, timeless. Not beach holiday. Not mythology. Not maximalist luxury. Something quieter and more personal than that. --- **The brand** ZELANI sells fresh- and salt water pearl jewelry to sophisticated women aged 28–38 who buy intentionally and wear beautifully. The customer is the woman in business class who doesn't need to try hard. She already knows. ZELANI is what she wears. --- **What I need** A complete brand identity system built for a premium DTC jewelry brand Specifically: - Logo and wordmark (primary + secondary lockups) - Color palette — think warm neutrals, coastal whites, soft stone tones. Nothing cold, nothing dark - Typography system — elegant but not ornate. Serif with restraint - Brand guidelines document - Packaging direction — minimal, tactile, giftable - Social media visual system — grid aesthetic, story templates, content mood - Brand mood board and creative direction document I can hand to photographers and influencers Exact deliverables will be decided upon first contact --- **What this is NOT** - No mythology, no Renaissance imagery, no classical references - No dark color palettes or jewel tones - No ornate or maximalist design — restraint is everything - No generic luxury that could belong to any brand ZELANI should feel like it has a specific place of origin and a specific woman in mind. If it could belong to anyone, it's wrong. --- **You're the right fit if** - Your portfolio shows range — you can do both editorial minimal and warm coastal without defaulting to one mode - You've worked with DTC or luxury consumer brands, ideally in jewelry, beauty, or wellness - You lead with questions before you lead with concepts — you want to understand the brand before you design it - You deliver a system, not just a logo --- **Process and timeline** I move quickly and make decisions. I'm not a committee. I expect a discovery session, a defined creative brief, concept directions, and a final delivery. Realistic timeline and clear milestones matter to me. Please share your hourly rate or a project fee estimate. More importantly, share 2–3 portfolio pieces that feel closest to the ZELANI direction as you understand it from this post — coastal, minimal, warm, sophisticated. That tells me everything. --- *ZELANI is a pearl jewelry brand launching in 2026. Built to last, designed to be worn every day by women who know exactly what they're doing.*

title: Restaurant Menu Redesign
desc: Project Overview We are a ramen and sushi restaurant called House of Umami. We are updating our existing printed menu and need a professional designer to revise the layout while incorporating new menu items and pricing updates. The goal is not a full redesign, but rather an updated, clean version of our existing menu that fits additional items without feeling crowded, especially on the ramen section. Our current menu is a tri-fold printed menu (22.5” x 12” unfolded) used for dine-in customers. Scope of Work The designer will: Update our existing menu design Insert new menu items Remove discontinued items Update prices Adjust categories where needed Optimize the layout Ensure all content fits cleanly within the tri-fold format Improve readability and flow Avoid overcrowding (especially in the ramen section) Reorganize sections if necessary Current menu sections include: Small Plates Sushi Bowls Artisan Ramen Donburi Rice Bowls Sushi Rolls Nigiri / Sashimi Kids Desserts Solve the biggest layout challenge We are adding several ramen items and a Wagyu section. The designer should thoughtfully reorganize the ramen area so it remains clear and easy to read. Maintain our current brand style The current menu has: Dark background Food photography Red accent elements Japanese ramen/sushi aesthetic We want the same general vibe, but cleaner and more professional. Deliverables Final deliverables should include: • Print-ready PDF (CMYK, 300 DPI) • Editable source file (Adobe Illustrator or InDesign preferred) • Fonts and linked assets included • Correct bleed and margins for print Menu size: 22.5” x 12” unfolded tri-fold (this can be adjusted if needed to fit content) Files Provided We will provide: • Current menu PDF + AI file for current menu • Document outlining menu changes • Updated item descriptions and prices • Existing brand visuals What We’re Looking For Ideal candidates should have: • Experience designing restaurant menus • Strong typography and layout skills • Ability to organize large amounts of menu content clearly • Experience designing tri-fold or multi-panel menus Success Criteria The final menu should: • Fit all new content cleanly • Be easy for guests to scan and order from • Highlight ramen and signature items effectively • Maintain a premium, modern ramen-house aesthetic Timeline Looking to complete within 2-4 days after hiring. To Apply Please include: • 2–3 examples of restaurant menu designs you’ve created • Confirmation you can deliver editable files • Estimated turnaround time
mcp_workflow: asset_add_file (current menu PDF + AI file, change doc, updated copy, brand visuals) -> document_render_layout (export client AI/IDML to working proof) -> fill_text (insert new items, update prices, remove discontinued) -> asset_preview_file
inputs: Current menu PDF + Illustrator (.ai) source file (client provides)
Document of menu changes (additions: Wagyu section + new ramen items; removals; price updates)
Updated item descriptions & prices
Existing brand visuals (dark bg, food photography, red accents, Japanese aesthetic)
Trim size 22.5"x12" unfolded tri-fold; CMYK 300 DPI; correct bleed/margins
Deliverable: print-ready CMYK PDF + editable AI/INDD with fonts & linked assets
note: Connector can export/proof and swap copy on the client AI file, but the real ask is editorial reflow of a dense tri-fold (reorganise ramen, add Wagyu section without crowding) and packaging editable AI source with fonts — a human designer must do the layout reflow and pre-press.

title: Bold Men’s Wellness Ad Creatives
desc:
I need three 1080×1080 static images and one 15-30 sec video that feel bold and energetic, built specifically to drive direct sales on both Facebook and Instagram. You’ll receive high-resolution product photos, the landing page URL, brand guidelines, and a few competitor examples; your job is to turn them into premium-looking ads that stop the scroll, highlight benefits fast, and close with a strong call to action.

You should already know the nuances of eCommerce and D2C creative testing—visual hierarchy that works in the Meta feed, safe-zone text placement, and thumb-stopping motion for short-form video. If you’ve produced for wellness, supplements, or similar niches, that background will help you nail the messaging style more quickly.

Deliverables  
• 3 static ad images (JPG/PNG + layered PSD/AI/Canva)  
• 1 short ad video (MP4 + project file)  
• Designs formatted for Facebook & Instagram placements  
• Final assets named clearly and ready to upload

When you respond, please include:  
1. A link to your portfolio, highlighting any high-performing wellness or eCommerce ads.  
2. Examples of previous campaigns where your creative boosted ROAS or conversions.  
3. Your quickest realistic turnaround time for the full set.

I’m ready to move quickly and will award the project as soon as I see a fit. Looking forward to your concepts.

title: Graphic Designer
desc: Graphic Designer — Contract Remote-friendly · Ongoing · Figma required · Start ASAP Everlab is Australia's leading preventive health and longevity clinic. We're a fast-moving marketing team with a strong visual identity, a growing content pipeline, and a lot on our plate. We're looking for a sharp contract designer to plug in immediately and help us execute across social, email, and ad formats — no hand-holding required. What you'll be working on Social content — Feed posts, stories, and carousel assets across Instagram, Facebook, and LinkedIn. Channel-appropriate sizing and formatting is a must — you should know what performs where. EDMs — Email design assets and templates aligned to our brand. Clean, elevated layouts that hold up at small sizes and in dark mode. Paid ad creative — Static ad assets for Meta campaigns across multiple formats and sizes. Experience with performance-driven design is a bonus. Ad hoc requests — Presentations, one-pagers, partner assets, and anything else the team needs turned around quickly. Volume is real — flexibility is key. What we need from you Figma proficiency — You live in Figma. Components, auto-layout, shared styles — second nature. Brand discipline — We have a defined style guide. You'll work within it — not around it. Elevated design eye — You know the difference between good and great. Health and wellness aesthetics are a plus. Channel awareness — You understand how design behaves differently across Instagram, email, and paid — and you design accordingly. Responsive and reliable — Fast turnarounds, clear communication, no chasing required. High volume comfort — We have a lot on. You can manage a queue, prioritise, and produce at pace. About the engagement Hours are flexible — we're not committing to a fixed weekly number upfront because our output needs fluctuate. What we can say is there's consistent work, and the right person will find there's plenty to get into. We're open to discussing a day-rate or hourly structure depending on your preference. This is a BAU-first role, but it touches the full breadth of our marketing output. If you're motivated by quality output, enjoy working in a tight-knit team, and like seeing your work go live quickly — this is a good fit.

title: Freelance Graphic Designer — Digital Ad Creative | DTC Wellness Brand
desc: Freelance Graphic Designer — Digital Ad Creative | DTC Wellness Brand We are a Canadian women's health and wellness brand looking for an experienced freelance graphic designer to support the development of digital ad creative across organic and paid media channels. What we are looking for We need a designer who can produce both static and video creative assets for use across Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, Pinterest, and Google. You should be comfortable working within a brand system and translating science-backed health claims into visually compelling, compliant creative that resonates with a health-conscious female audience. The right candidate has: Demonstrated experience working with DTC wellness, health, or supplement brands A strong working knowledge of compliance requirements and FTC/FDA guidelines around health and supplement advertising The ability to produce both static assets and short-form video creative (reels, stories, ads) Experience designing for both organic social and paid media placements A portfolio that demonstrates clean, premium design sensibility in the health and wellness space What we are not looking for Generalist designers without category experience. The final artwork should feel premium, international, trustworthy, and corporate while incorporating a subtle airport and travel-related atmosphere. A large QR code will be one of the primary call-to-action elements within the advertisement. title: Graphic Designer Needed for Performance Meta Ads (Food & Beverage Brands)
desc: We are looking for a talented graphic designer to create 4 high-converting, scroll-stopping static image ads for a Food & Beverage brand focused on strong performance marketing across Meta (Facebook & Instagram). These ads will be used for paid social media advertising campaigns, so experience in direct-response creative design and performance marketing is highly preferred. Our goal is to create visuals that don’t just look good — they capture attention immediately, communicate value fast, and drive conversions. We are looking for a designer who understands how to create ads that stop the scroll within 1–2 seconds and are optimized for CTR and engagement. Project Scope Create 4 static image ads, each targeting a different food & beverage angle: 1. Product Highlight / Hero Offer Ad Target Goal: Showcase the main product in an appetizing, high-impact way that instantly grabs attention. Focus on: Visual appeal (texture, freshness, quality) Strong headline or hook Clear product positioning 2. Lifestyle / Emotional Consumption Ad Target Goal: Connect the product with a lifestyle moment (comfort, enjoyment, sharing, energy, etc.). Focus on: Emotional storytelling Relatable real-life scenarios Strong visual mood (warm, premium, or refreshing depending on brand) 3. Problem → Solution Ad Target Goal: Highlight a common food-related problem and position the product as the solution. Examples: “Hungry but want something healthy?” “Need a quick, satisfying snack?” “Tired of unhealthy fast options?” Focus on: Clear pain point Simple value proposition Strong before/after messaging style 4. Offer / Conversion Ad Target Goal: Drive direct action (purchase, order, or visit). Focus on: Limited-time offer or promotion Strong CTA (Shop Now / Order Today) Clean, conversion-focused layout Deliverables 4 static Meta ad creatives (Facebook & Instagram optimized) Proper sizing for all placements Editable source files (Canva preferred or Adobe files accepted) Up to 2 revision rounds included Style Direction We are looking for designs that are: Bold and visually striking Clean and modern Highly appetizing / visually engaging Optimized for scroll-stopping performance Built with strong visual hierarchy Avoid generic templates or low-effort stock-style designs. Strong emphasis on: Attention-grabbing hooks Clear messaging hierarchy Emotional or sensory triggers (taste, freshness, craving) Conversion-focused layout and CTA placement Assets Provided We will provide: Brand guidelines (logo, colors, fonts if available) Product photos/videos Copy and messaging direction Offer details (if applicable) Designers may use additional copyright-safe assets where needed to enhance visual quality. Preferred Experience Meta / Facebook / Instagram ad creative design Food & beverage marketing or e-commerce ads Direct-response advertising understanding Strong grasp of CTR / conversion-focused creative principles Application Requirement Please include examples of previous Meta ad creatives or performance marketing work, especially in food, beverage, or consumer product niches. We are looking for a designer who understands that great ads are not just designed — they are engineered to make people stop scrolling and take action.

First Responders – PS3P Program Public Safety Physical Performance Program (PS3P) Target Audience: Law Enforcement Firefighters EMS First Responders Goal: Highlight our program helping first responders improve fitness, durability, resilience, and pain management while optimizing job performance. 2. Goal: Communicate overcoming pain, rebuilding confidence, and getting back to 100% performance and field/court time. Examples: Back pain Knee pain Shoulder pain Recurring injuries 3. Active Adults – Recurring Back Pain Target Audience: Adults who have tried multiple approaches but continue dealing with recurring back pain. New Gym Membership Promotion Target Audience: Busy adults wanting a private, supportive training environment. Goal: Highlight: Private gym atmosphere Strength & stability programming Rehab-informed training environment Access to in-house rehab professionals Small membership community Deliverables: 4 finalized static image advertisements Sizes optimized for Facebook / Instagram placements Editable source files included (Canva preferred, Adobe acceptable) Revisions included (up to 2 rounds) Style Direction: We are looking for designs that are: Bold Clean Modern Professional Scroll-stopping within the first 1–2 seconds Avoid generic stock-ad aesthetics. Preferred Experience: META ad creative design Fitness industry marketing Healthcare/chiropractic/rehab marketing Direct-response advertising principles Understanding of CTR/CPC-focused ad creative Please include examples of previous META/Facebook/Instagram ad creatives with your application. INTRODUCTION PAGE "These pages belong to Tommie and Patricia. May they be filled with photographs, stories, discoveries, friendships, meals, adventures, and memories from Arkansas for many years to come." GUIDED JOURNAL PAGES Please create a page layout for each of these sections: The First Trip The Best Meal We Ate The Best Breakfast The Best Piece of Pie The Friendliest Person We Met The Road We Didn't Plan To Take The View That Made Us Pull Over The Place We Stayed An Extra Day The Most Surprising Town The Best Story We Heard People We Were Glad To See Again The Best Day Of The Trip The Place We Want To Return To Arkansas Discoveries Next Time... Ideal Experience • Proven experience creating YouTube thumbnails. • Understanding of click through rate and viewer psychology. • Experience working with meditation, mindfulness, spirituality, wellness, self development, or related audiences. • Strong eye for emotion, composition, lighting, and visual storytelling. • Ability to create cinematic and emotionally engaging imagery. • Comfortable using AI tools if they help achieve excellent results. Current Workload Initially around 2 videos per week with potential to grow to 5 videos per week over time. What Matters Most I care much more about results than specific software. Bonus if you have experience in meditation, mindfulness, spirituality, sleep content, personal growth, or wellness focused YouTube channels. Please ensure your application includes the requested examples and information above. Due to the number of applications expected, only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. title: Hight CTR YouTube Thumbnail Design for Spiritual Channel
desc: Channel Reference: https://www.youtube.com/@ThisisMariya/videos GOAL: Create highly clickable YouTube thumbnails with strong CTR potential while maintaining a premium, spiritual, feminine, intelligent, and trustworthy aesthetic. The thumbnails should feel mystical and emotionally activating — NOT cheesy, gimmicky, fake “guru,” or over-saturated spiritual cliché. The channel is about: spirituality consciousness energy manifestation divine feminine healing portals / energetic updates esoteric wisdom transformation CORE CREATIVE DIRECTION: The thumbnails should feel: magnetic cinematic sacred emotionally charged elegant mysterious modern spiritual high-frequency premium YouTube-native Avoid: cheap “law of attraction” aesthetics excessive glowing eyes / fake lightning rainbow overload clutter generic Canva spiritual style stock-photo coaching vibe forced clickbait expressions The best reference energy is: “luxury spiritual cinema” + “mystical documentary” + “divine feminine oracle” THUMBNAIL PRIORITIES (MOST IMPORTANT): Immediate emotional intrigue Curiosity gap Human connection through Mariya’s face/eyes Strong readability on mobile Clear visual hierarchy Consistent recognizable brand identity Feels elevated and intentional VISUAL STYLE: Dark/moody backgrounds with luminous highlights Gold, cream, deep plum, black, rose, cosmic blue, candlelight tones Ethereal lighting Soft glow accents used minimally and tastefully Cinematic contrast Depth and atmosphere Sacred geometry / cosmic textures used subtly Premium typography only FACE & EXPRESSION DIRECTION: Mariya should look: calm but powerful deeply knowing emotionally present magnetic spiritually activated compassionate yet intense Avoid exaggerated YouTube shock faces. TEXT STYLE: Very short text (2–6 words ideal) Large and instantly readable on mobile Use emotionally charged phrases Text should create curiosity, urgency, or revelation Examples: “The Portal Has Opened” “You’re Awakening” “This Changes Everything” “The Energy Shift Is Here” “Why You Feel Different” “The Divine Feminine Returns” COMPOSITION: Preferred: Large close-up portrait Strong focal point Minimal distractions One dominant emotional idea Cinematic cropping Clean separation between subject/background CTR PSYCHOLOGY: Thumbnail should trigger: curiosity emotional resonance spiritual significance transformation exclusivity mystery “I NEED to know this” It should feel like: “This video contains hidden wisdom specifically for me.” BRAND CONSISTENCY: All thumbnails should look like part of one recognizable universe. A viewer should instantly recognize a Mariya thumbnail without reading the channel name. IMPORTANT: Do NOT optimize for generic YouTube trends. Optimize for: spiritual sophistication emotional depth trust mystery feminine power premium visual identity DELIVERABLE IDEALLY: Reusable thumbnail system/template Typography system Color system Facial treatment style 3–5 thumbnail variations per video for CTR testing

title: Vinyl Shop Branding Sticker Design
desc:
I’m refreshing my store’s look and need a set of eye-catching vinyl stickers that will carry our branding consistently across glass doors, counters, product displays, and even the exterior façade. Because these decals must perform both indoors and out, durability and colour fidelity matter just as much as great design.  

Here’s what I’m after: a creative concept that reflects our current logo palette, scalable layouts for several sizes (small shelf labels up to large window pieces), and print-ready artwork optimised for high-tack, weather-resistant vinyl. If you routinely prep files for digital printing—complete with bleed, trim marks and cut lines—you’ll feel right at home on this project.

Deliverables should include:
• Two initial design directions with room for feedback  
• Final vector artwork (AI/SVG) and a press-ready PDF for each approved size  
• A simple usage sheet showing placement mock-ups so my installer knows where everything goes  

Experience with vinyl sticker production is a plus; knowledge of proper lamination recommendations for UV and scratch protection will help my print shop turn these around quickly. Let me know your turnaround time and how many revision rounds you’re comfortable including. Looking forward to seeing how you can turn this branding into bold, enduring stickers!
task_type: Vinyl Branding Sticker Set — multiple sizes (shelf to window)
mcp_workflow: search_design (Express sticker/decal template reflecting logo palette) -> asset_add_file (store logo) -> fill_text (any store copy) -> image_crop_and_resize (scale to each size: small shelf label up to large window piece) -> image_vectorize -> document_render_vector (AI/SVG) -> document_convert_pdf (press-ready per size)
inputs: Current store logo files + brand colour palette (exact hex to confirm)
List of required sizes (small shelf labels through large window/facade pieces)
Any text/copy to appear on the decals
Outputs: final vector AI/SVG + press-ready PDF per approved size with bleed/trim/cut lines; placement mock-up usage sheet
Production note: high-tack weather-resistant vinyl, UV/scratch lamination recommendations (advisory — confirm with print shop)
note: Express templates + logo placement + vectorize/resize produce the decals; proper print prep (cut lines, bleed, lamination spec) and a bespoke creative concept beyond template assets are finished by a human/print shop.

title: Edición Dinámica de Clips Twitch
desc:
Quiero transformar mis transmisiones de Twitch en piezas verticales listas para TikTok e Instagram. Cada clip debe durar más de un minuto y mantener un ritmo rápido y dinámico que enganche desde el primer segundo.  

Busco una edición que:  
• Corte lo mejor de mis directos y mantenga la energía del chat y el gameplay.  
• Añada texto en pantalla que refuerce chistes, reacciones o llamadas a la acción.  
• Incluya emojis, stickers y animaciones simples para enfatizar momentos clave sin saturar la imagen.  
• Ajuste el formato a 9:16, exportando en la mejor resolución para ambos canales.  

Entrego el VOD marcado con los momentos destacados; tú te encargas de pulirlos, sincronizar audio y video y devolverme archivos finales y, si es posible, los proyectos editables. Necesito alguien ágil, creativo y con experiencia previa en contenido vertical para redes sociales.
mcp_workflow: media_summarize (locate highlight moments in the marked VOD) -> video_create_quick_cut (cut the best fast-paced moments, hook-first) -> media_enhance_speech (balance audio) -> video_resize (reframe to 9:16, max resolution) -> asset_preview_file
inputs: Twitch VOD with the highlight moments already marked by the client
Target: 1-min+ vertical clips, fast dynamic pacing, hook in first second
On-screen text for jokes/reactions/CTAs + emojis/stickers/simple animations to add
Outputs: 9:16 final files (best resolution for TikTok & Instagram) + editable project files if possible
note: Connector cuts the highlights, balances audio and reframes to 9:16; the on-screen captions, emojis, stickers and simple animations the brief wants are added by a human in CapCut/Premiere.

title: Logo Vector Re-Creation & Text
desc:
I have a logo only available as a JPEG and I’m getting stickers produced, so I need the artwork rebuilt as a clean, fully-scalable vector. The look, colours, and layout should mirror the current design; the only tweak is updating a few words in the text while everything else stays intact.

Please redraw it from scratch—not an auto-trace—so curves are crisp and shapes close cleanly. Match the original font where possible or replicate it so the change is seamless. When you’re done, hand over editable vector files (AI or EPS), an SVG, and a print-ready PDF sized for sticker production.

I’ll supply the JPEG and details of the wording to swap as soon as you’re on board, then review an initial proof before we finalise the files.

title: Catchy Water Bottle Label Design
desc:
I need a fresh set of water-bottle labels that feel playful and instantly catch the eye of brewery and restaurant patrons. The look we’re after is colorful, bright, and bold— nothing muted or vintage—so please lean into lively palettes, dynamic shapes, and fun typography.  

The label must keep our brand logo and the product name front and center; everything else can be treated as supportive design elements. I’ll supply logo files, dielines, and a short creative brief the moment we kick off. From there, I’d like to collaborate through two or three quick review rounds to make sure the artwork reflects the quirky, upbeat personality we’ve established for our clients.

Deliverables  
• Two initial concepts presented as flat mock-ups  
• One final print-ready file (AI or layered PSD + PDF) sized to the provided dieline  
• All linked fonts and graphics in an organized package

I work in Adobe Illustrator, so an .ai master file keeps hand-offs simple, but if you prefer Photoshop that’s fine as long as layers remain editable.

If bright, bold, and playful label design is in your wheelhouse, let’s talk and get these bottles looking great.
