title: Graphic Designer (Ongoing Monthly Work)
desc: I'm looking for a highly skilled freelance graphic designer to support a growing portfolio of design projects on an ongoing basis. This is not a one-off assignment. The right person will become a trusted creative partner and work directly with me across multiple projects each month. There is a significant amount of work in the pipeline, and this opportunity has the potential to grow into a long-term, high-value engagement for the right candidate. *** What I'm Looking For *** I am not looking for someone who simply follows instructions and executes revisions. I'm looking for a designer who can take ownership of projects from concept through completion. You should be able to think strategically, contribute creative ideas, identify potential issues before they become problems, and deliver polished, professional work with minimal hand-holding. Strong attention to detail, excellent communication skills, and the ability to work independently are critical. *** Types of Projects *** Projects may include: 1. Corporate brochures and company profiles 2. Investor presentations and pitch decks 3. Investment guides and educational resources 4. Marketing collateral 5. Digital advertising creative 6. Social media graphics 7. Trade show and event materials 8. Brand guideline documents 9. Website and landing page design assets 10. Other business and marketing-related design projects *** Preferred Experience *** While not required, preference will be given to candidates with experience working with: 1. Commercial real estate firms 2. Real estate developers 3. Investment firms 4. Financial services organizations 5. Professional services companies Experience designing materials intended for investors, executives, or high-net-worth audiences is a significant plus. *** Requirements *** 1. Strong portfolio showcasing professional business-focused design work 2. Ability to manage projects from initial concept through final delivery 3. Excellent visual design and layout skills 4. Strong understanding of branding and visual consistency 5. High level of responsiveness and communication 6. Ability to meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment 7. title: Social Media Designer — Instagram
desc: About us Unstoppable is a premium remote health and fitness coaching brand for men and women 35+, active on Instagram (originating in London). We have a strong, established brand identity — bold, clean, black and off-white with a premium feel. We provide all copy and imagery; we need someone to execute the design with precision and consistency. The role We're looking for a talented Instagram designer to produce polished, on-brand content — starting with an immediate batch of carousels and stories, with the potential to become a fortnightly retainer if the work is strong. This is not a rebrand. You'll work within our existing style guide, so the ability to absorb a brief and execute it accurately is non-negotiable. Phase 1 — immediate project Now Design 10 x carousel posts and 5 x story assets. Full brand assets, copy, and imagery will be supplied. 1 round of amends included. Must have a great eye for detail, have some scope of trends within the industry for a high end sport feel (think brands like ALO, Marchon, on etc for style/presentation) Phase 2 — ongoing retainer Fortnightly If Phase 1 goes well, we'll move to a recurring fortnightly package of the same volume. Ad hoc graphic requests (event assets, launch graphics) may also arise. What we're looking for Strong Instagram portfolio — specifically multi-slide carousels and story design for service brands Proven ability to replicate an existing brand style accurately (not impose your own) Proficiency in Canva Pro and/or Adobe — please specify what you use Understanding of what performs on Instagram for coaching and lifestyle brands Fast, reliable delivery with minimal back-and-forth Available to start immediately
task_type: 10 carousel posts + 5 story assets (premium fitness brand)
mcp_workflow: asset_add_file (supplied brand assets, copy, imagery) -> search_design (Express carousel + story templates in black/off-white style) -> fill_text (supplied copy per slide) -> image_crop_and_resize (1080x1080 carousel + 1080x1920 story) -> asset_preview_file
inputs: Brand style guide: bold/clean, black + off-white palette, fonts (provided)
All copy per slide (provided)
All imagery (provided)
Counts: 10 carousels + 5 story assets; sizes 1080x1080 + 1080x1920
1 round of amends
note: Connector fills supplied copy + imagery into matching templates; replicating the exact established brand style (precise type/spacing, ALO/On-tier feel) is finished by a human. fill_text edits copy only.

title: Canva Designer for Social Media Template Systems

We are looking for someone who can build organized, scalable Canva libraries that our team can use to quickly create content across multiple brands. Responsibilities: - Create Canva template systems - Design social media post templates - Design Instagram Story templates - Design Reel cover templates - Create promotional and campaign graphics - Organize Canva folders and brand assets - Maintain brand consistency across clients - Occasionally create custom graphics as needed Ideal Experience: - Strong Canva expertise - Social media design - Brand systems and template creation - Marketing and advertising creative - Hospitality, restaurant, retail, or local business experience is a plus Deliverables: For each client, we typically need: - 10–20 social post templates - Story templates - Reel cover templates - Promotional graphics - Seasonal campaign assets To Apply: Please provide: - Canva portfolio examples - Examples of template systems you have created - Social media brands you have worked with - Your availability for ongoing work - Your hourly rate We are looking to build a long-term relationship with the right designer as we continue adding clients.
task_type: Branded social template system per client — 10-20 posts, stories, reel covers
mcp_workflow: asset_add_file (client brand assets) -> search_design (Express post/story/reel-cover templates per client) -> fill_text (sample copy) -> image_crop_and_resize (feed/story/cover sizes) -> asset_preview_file
inputs: Per-client brand kit: logo, colours, fonts
Counts per client: 10–20 post templates, story templates, reel cover templates, promo + seasonal graphics
Sizes: 1080x1080 feed, 1080x1920 story, reel cover
Sample copy to demonstrate each template
note: Express templates provide reusable per-format layouts to fill; building an organised scalable brand library and brand-exact styling are human work. fill_text edits copy only.

title: Best Social Media Brand Identity Designer On The Planet.

We are not looking for basic Canva templates or generic real estate content. We want someone with taste, creativity, strong design instincts, and the ability to think independently. You will be responsible for creating Instagram posts from start to finish, including: -Post concepts -Design -Captions -Hashtags -Carousel layouts -Brand-consistent visuals Our style is clean, sharp, premium, modern, and authoritative. Think institutional real estate firm, not local realtor page. We acquires $120M+ in real estate annually, and our content needs to reflect that level of credibility and execution. We want someone who can take our company, deals, insights, and brand vision — and turn them into high-quality Instagram content that feels NOBU standard. Ideal candidate: Strong Instagram/social media design portfolio Excellent taste in typography, layout, and branding Able to write clean captions and relevant hashtags Creative enough to bring post ideas without being micromanaged Experience with real estate, finance, luxury, or corporate brands is a plus Fast, reliable, and detail-oriented To apply, send your portfolio, examples of Instagram work, your rate, and a short explanation of how you would make the company look elite online. Lets talk! ;)

title: Graphic Designer for Social Media Ads
desc: We are looking for a talented Graphic Designer to create high-converting social media ads for our jewelry brand. This role is focused on designing premium, scroll-stopping creatives for platforms like Meta (Instagram, and Pinterest. You should understand how to combine strong visuals, clean layouts, emotional messaging, and direct-response design to create ads that not only look beautiful but also drive clicks and sales. You will work closely with our creative team to turn ideas, angles, product photos, UGC content, customer reviews, and brand messaging into polished ad creatives. Responsibilities Create static ads, carousel ads, story ads, and social media graphics for organic and paid advertising. Design creatives for Meta (Facebook and Instagram) and other social platforms. Turn creative briefs into strong visual concepts that match the brand direction. Create premium, clean, and feminine designs that feel modern, elegant, and conversion-focused. Use product images, lifestyle images, customer reviews, UGC screenshots, offer messaging, and trust signals in a visually strong way. Design multiple variations of the same ad concept for testing hooks, layouts, text, colors, and formats. Understand how to create strong visual hierarchy, clear messaging, and scroll-stopping first impressions. Work with feedback and make revisions quickly. Keep designs consistent with the brand’s style, colors, fonts, and overall luxury feel. Requirements Strong experience designing social media ads, especially for e-commerce brands. A strong portfolio showing paid social ads, static ads, carousels, landing page graphics, or conversion-focused designs. Good understanding of direct-response design, visual hooks, and ad psychology. Ability to create clean, premium, modern designs without making them look generic or overdesigned. Strong eye for typography, spacing, layout, color, and visual hierarchy. Experience with Canva, Figma, Photoshop, Illustrator, or similar tools. Ability to follow briefs but also bring your own creative ideas. Fast turnaround and strong communication. Experience with jewelry, fashion, beauty, lifestyle, or DTC brands is a big plus. What We Are Looking For We are not looking for someone who only makes designs look “pretty.” We are looking for someone who understands how ads work. You should be able to think about: What makes someone stop scrolling What makes the product feel desirable How to make the offer clear without making the design look cheap How to make jewelry feel premium, emotional, and gift-worthy How to design ads that feel native to social media but still look polished and on-brand Nice to Have Experience designing for Meta Ads. Experience creating ad variations for A/B testing. Experience working with UGC content and customer review creatives. Understanding of e-commerce conversion principles. Experience with fashion, jewelry, beauty, or luxury-inspired brands. Work Details Part-time or freelance position. Remote role. Ongoing work available for the right person. Please apply with: Your portfolio Examples of social media ads you have designed Your hourly rate or package pricing Your availability A short explanation of your experience with e-commerce or paid social ads.
task_type: Social ad creatives — static, carousel, story (jewelry, Meta/Pinterest)
mcp_workflow: image_remove_background (jewelry product cutout) -> image_apply_auto_tone (product polish) -> search_design (Express ad/carousel/story template) -> fill_text (offer + review copy) -> asset_add_file (product/lifestyle/UGC images + logo) -> image_crop_and_resize (Meta 1080x1080/1080x1920 + Pinterest 1000x1500) -> asset_preview_file
inputs: Product images, lifestyle images, UGC screenshots, customer reviews
Brand logo + premium/feminine palette + fonts
Offer/messaging + trust signals per ad
Formats: static, carousel, story ads; multiple variations for A/B testing
Sizes: Meta 1080x1080 + 1080x1920, Pinterest 1000x1500
note: Cutouts + tone + template fill + resize are doable; the premium direct-response art direction and brand-exact styling for testing variants are finished by a human. fill_text edits copy only.

title: Part-Time Canva Designer Needed for Health & Wellness Brand: Flyers, Social Media
desc: Title: Part-Time Canva Designer Needed for Health & Wellness Brand: Flyers, Social Media Carousels, Trifold Brochure Job Description: I am looking for a part-time Canva designer / creative assistant to help with branded design projects for a physician-led health and wellness education brand. I need help creating clean, polished, professional designs using my existing brand colors, fonts, logo, and visual style. Projects may include: • One-page flyers • Instagram/social media carousels • Pinterest graphics • Trifold brochures • Simple handouts or lead magnets • Canva templates that I can reuse and edit later This is a small ongoing role, likely less than 5 hours per week, starting with a paid trial project. If the trial goes well, I may continue with weekly design support. What I’m looking for: • Strong Canva design skills • Experience creating social media carousels and print materials • Ability to follow an existing brand kit and visual direction • Clean, modern, high-quality design style • Good sense of spacing, hierarchy, fonts, and readability • Fluent English communication • Ability to take provided copy and turn it into polished visual content • Comfortable working with health, wellness, lifestyle medicine, brain health, and educational content • Reliable turnaround and clear communication • Ability to create different design versions from existing content while staying aligned with the original message Important details: I will provide the written content, brand colors, logo, and design examples. I am not looking for medical writing or independent health claims development. This is a physician-led brand, so accuracy, clarity, and trustworthiness are very important. The designer may occasionally be asked to help turn existing content into different formats, such as converting a blog section into a carousel, flyer, handout, or brochure. However, the designer should not independently add, change, or expand medical claims. Any edited, shortened, or reformatted copy must be reviewed and approved by me before use. I need help with layout, visual design, Canva execution, brand consistency, and making materials look polished and professional. I will remain responsible for medical accuracy, final wording, and approval before anything is published or printed. All final designs must be delivered as editable Canva files/templates, not just PDFs or images. Additional requirements: • Must be comfortable working with physician-led educational content • Must be able to follow provided copy closely • Must not add unsupported health claims, statistics, guarantees, or disease-treatment language • Must use only licensed, Canva-approved, or approved brand images/graphics • Must deliver all designs as editable Canva links/files • Must keep all brand materials confidential and not reuse designs for other clients • If AI tools are used for design support, please disclose this. No AI-generated medical claims or unverified health copy should be added. Trial project may include: • 1 branded Instagram carousel, or • 1 one-page flyer, or • 1 trifold brochure draft Please include: 1. Examples of Canva designs you have created, especially carousels, flyers, brochures, or wellness/education graphics 2. Your hourly rate 3. Your usual turnaround time for a 5–8 slide carousel or one-page flyer 4. Confirmation that you can deliver editable Canva links/files 5. A brief note about how you approach brand consistency 6. Confirmation that you are comfortable working with provided medical/wellness copy without independently changing health claims I am looking for someone detail-oriented, professional, and creative who can help me move faster while keeping the brand polished, trustworthy, and accurate.
task_type: Branded flyers, carousels, Pinterest graphics + trifold brochure (wellness)
mcp_workflow: asset_add_file (existing brand kit: logo/colours/fonts) -> search_design (Express flyer / carousel / Pinterest / trifold-brochure templates) -> fill_text (physician-approved copy) -> image_crop_and_resize (per format) -> asset_preview_file
inputs: Existing brand kit: logo, brand colours, fonts (provided)
Provided written copy (physician-approved; designer must not alter health claims)
Deliverables: one-page flyers, IG carousels (5–8 slides), Pinterest graphics, trifold brochure, handouts/lead magnets
Sizes: A4/letter flyer, 1080x1080 carousel, 1000x1500 Pinterest, trifold print
Note: client requires editable Canva files specifically
note: Connector fills approved copy into Express templates; client mandates editable CANVA files (connector outputs Express/PDF, not Canva) and brand-exact styling needs a human in the brand tool. fill_text edits copy only.

title: Luxury Medical Spa Marketing Package

title: Graphic Designer for Agency Clients Branding & Social Media (Health, Wellness & Tech)
desc: We're a creative agency looking for a talented designer to join us as a collaborative partner on client branding projects. You'll work across a portfolio of clients, primarily in health & wellness, hospitality, and tech, helping build identities that feel modern, considered, and genuinely distinctive. Beyond brand work, you'll also be hands-on creating social content , producing scroll-stopping posts, stories, and short-form visuals for Instagram, TikTok, and beyond. Speed matters here: we need someone who can deliver polished work efficiently without the back-and-forth. --- WHAT YOU'LL WORK ON • Client brand identity — logos, color systems, typography, and brand guidelines • Social media content — Instagram feed posts, stories, reels covers, TikTok visuals, carousels • Health & wellness branding — clean, trusted, premium aesthetics • Tech brand design — sharp, forward-thinking visuals for tech and SaaS clients --- WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR • A portfolio with genuinely impressive, modern branding work — we should be able to see your taste immediately • Experience designing for health & wellness and/or tech brands is a strong plus • Efficient social content creation — you know the formats, you know what performs, and you can move fast • Comfortable in an agency setting — juggling multiple clients, taking feedback gracefully, and hitting deadlines • Proficient in Adobe Creative Suite (Illustrator, Photoshop) and/or Figma • Bonus: you actively explore and experiment with new AI tools to work smarter and faster --- HOW TO APPLY Send us a link to your portfolio and highlight 2–3 projects you're most proud of especially any work in health, wellness, hospitality or tech. Bonus points if you include examples of social content you've created, and feel free to mention any AI tools you've been using in your workflow. Tell us a little about how you work and what your typical turnaround looks like.
task_type: Agency client social content — feed posts, stories, reel covers, carousels

title: Social Media and Paid Creative Designer for Dating App Launch
desc: We’re launching a new dating app built for people navigating real life: careers, responsibilities, children, busy schedules, emotional maturity, and intentional relationships. This is not a casual hookup app. The app is designed to feel calm, emotionally intelligent, modern, premium, and grounded — a meaningful alternative to traditional dating apps. We are currently in early launch phase in Brisbane, Australia and are looking for a talented freelance creative designer to help establish the visual creative system for: • Instagram/Facebook social content • Paid Meta ad creatives • Story/reel creatives • Brand-led storytelling content This role is focused purely on creative assets and visual execution. No media buying or Ads Manager setup is required. What We’re Looking For We’re looking for someone with strong experience creating: • High-performing Meta ad creatives • Mobile-first social content • Emotionally resonant visual storytelling • DTC/lifestyle/dating/wellness style branding • Premium but approachable design systems The ideal candidate understands: • Attention psychology • Conversion-focused creative • Emotional brand positioning • Social-first design • Modern Meta creative best practices Strong aesthetic judgment is extremely important. Deliverables Organic social (credibility foundation) • 6–8 feed posts • 3–4 story templates — reusable so I can update them myself going forward • Editable Canva or Figma files Paid ads (testing layer) • 4 short-form videos (2 per angle) • 4 static ad creatives (2 per angle) There may be ongoing work for the right person. Creative Direction The brand should feel: • Emotionally intelligent • Mature • Calm • Trustworthy • Intentional • Premium without feeling overly corporate The creative should NOT feel: • Loud • Flashy • Hookup-oriented • Meme-heavy • Generic dating app style We want the brand to feel fundamentally different from traditional dating apps. Important Notes This is an early-stage startup launch, so: • Speed and iteration matter • We will likely test multiple messaging angles • We value strategic thinking, not just graphic execution Please Include In Your Application 1. Examples of relevant work Please include examples of: • Meta ad creatives • Social campaigns • DTC/lifestyle/dating/wellness brands • Motion/reel creatives if applicable 2. Relevant experience Tell us: • What types of brands you’ve worked with • Whether you’ve worked on dating, lifestyle, wellness, or emotionally driven brands • Your experience with performance creative 3. Your creative process Briefly explain how you approach: • Creating ad concepts • Emotional storytelling • Iterating creative for performance 4. Availability Please provide: • Estimated turnaround times • Availability over the next 4–6 weeks Trial Task Shortlisted candidates may be asked to complete a small paid trial task to assess: • Creative direction • Emotional brand fit • Quality of execution • Understanding of the target audience This is important because the tone and positioning of the brand are critical to success. Budget USD$800 We are prioritizing: • Strong creative thinking • High-quality execution • Emotional resonance • Performance-oriented design If you think you’d be a strong fit, we’d love to hear from you. Please include: • Portfolio links • Relevant examples • Any questions you may have We’re looking for someone who can help shape the creative foundation of a meaningful long-term brand, not just produce generic social graphics.

title: Creative Designer - Social Media & Campaigns (Gen Z Expertise)
desc: We are looking for a Creative Designer who knows to adapt its design expertise to the client's brand and goal. It must have experience in strategic thinking/brainstorming and Gen Z audience expertise. If everything goes well, this is a long-term collaboration with a fast-moving team. What you will work on - Social media creatives for Instagram, TikTok (carousels, static posts, animated posts, stories, ads). - Creative direction: visual concepts, art direction for Instagram and TikTok social media posts. - Fast-turnaround deliverables that maintain high visual standards. You’ll have creative freedom to establish a fresh visual style; I don’t have preset colors, fonts, or a logo, and I’m open to whatever look you believe will grab traders’ attention. The graphics must quickly communicate three things at a glance: real success stories from readers, the book’s unique edge for option traders, and any limited-time discount I’m running.  

My total spend for this promotional burst is $10, so I’m counting on punchy, conversion-minded designs that can be recycled across multiple channels without further tweaks. If you can distill benefit-driven copy into clean telegram-ready images and deliver the final files in standard Telegram post dimensions, let’s talk.

desc:
Softer Days is a premium bamboo baby clothing brand launching in India — but the logo should not feel restricted to baby clothing. Think of it as a premium lifestyle brand that happens to start with babywear.
The name itself says everything — Softer Days speaks to both the fabric and the feeling of early parenthood. Where everything should be gentler, calmer, quieter. Nostalgic and warm, but with a quiet confidence. The kind of brand that could expand into bedding, skincare, lifestyle — and the logo should have that range built into it from Day 1.
What I don't want — no cutesy fonts, no rounded bubble letters, nothing that looks like a nursery wall or a typical baby brand. No pastel elephants, no illustrated prams, no overly playful typography.
What I do want — something refined, warm, and timeless. A logo a premium lifestyle brand would be proud of.

title: Lookbook Image Replacement
desc:

1.	Make three versions of the client’s logo:
a.	#1 00% black
b.	#2 100% white
c.	#3 Color version if applicable 
2.	Resolution for all logos should be:  1800x900 300dpi RGB 
a.	Logos should be centered on page. 
 
3.	Open the InDesign Template (Best Buy, Core, Direct/Promo) 
4.	Go to Links dialogue box:  
 
5.	Click On the EDIT BLACK LOGO, and (right click on mac) to get the Relink All Instances of ‘EDIT BLACK LOGO’. notice
6.	Replace with the client’s BLACK VERSION OF THEIR LOGO. Do the same for the color and then the white logos. 

7.	Skim each page to ensure that the logos are not cut off. You may have to slightly adjust a few logos or change them with a different version as client logos can greatly vary 
8.	When done, export as a high-quality print PDF and upload the pdf to the JotForm.

The three supplied InDesign templates: Best Buy, Core, and Direct/Promo (.indd)

You’ll handle everything from cutting the footage, colour-correcting, adding royalty-free music or on-trend audio, motion text, logo stings, and concise captions that reinforce our key selling points. If this sounds straightforward to you, let’s talk about a repeat workflow so new jobs can be turned around quickly and consistently.

title: Logo präzise vektorisieren
desc:
Ich stelle dir mein Logo als PNG/JPG zur Verfügung und brauche davon eine saubere, verlustfrei skalierbare Vektordatei.  
• Das Ergebnis soll in Formaten wie AI, EPS und SVG vorliegen.  
• Gestaltung, Farben und Proportionen müssen 1:1 mit dem Original übereinstimmen – keine stilistischen Abweichungen, keine Vereinfachungen.  
• Alle Kurven und Kanten sollen glatt nachgezeichnet, Texte in Pfade umgewandelt und Ebenen sinnvoll benannt sein, damit spätere Anpassungen leicht möglich sind.  

Bitte arbeite exakt, damit das Logo in jeder Größe gestochen scharf bleibt. Sobald du fertig bist, sende mir die offenen Dateien sowie eine PDF-Ansicht zum schnellen Prüfen.
task_type: PNG/JPG logo -> clean AI/EPS/SVG + PDF preview (1:1, lossless)
mcp_workflow: asset_add_file (client logo PNG/JPG) -> image_vectorize -> document_render_vector (export AI, EPS, SVG and a PDF view) -> asset_preview_file
inputs: Client's logo as PNG/JPG (the original to trace 1:1)
Required output formats: AI, EPS, SVG, plus a PDF for quick checking
Requirement: exact 1:1 match — same colours, proportions, no stylistic changes or simplification
Confirm whether text must be converted to outlines/paths and how layers should be named

title: Minimalist Photography Logo Design
desc:
I'm looking for a talented designer to create a logo for my photography business, Northbound Visuals. The logo should embody modern aesthetics and utilize a monochrome color scheme.

Key Requirements:
- Minimalist and modern design
- Monochrome color palette
- Relevant experience in logo design
- Strong portfolio showcasing past work

Please include your portfolio with your application. Looking forward to your creative proposals!

Monochrome palette — confirm exact black/grey value
Style direction: minimalist, modern; no icon explicitly required
Output formats wanted — confirm (high-res PNG; vector if needed)
note: fill_text only swaps the wordmark copy; the exact typeface/weight and any custom letter-spacing of a brand wordmark need a human in Express. If the client later wants a camera/photo icon mark, that is bespoke and out of scope.

It needs to look good on coffee cups, brown paper bags, and social media icons.Colors: Brown, beige, white, or black.Style: Minimalist line art or elegant typography.Deliverables: High-resolution PNG and vector files (AI/EPS).Contest 2: Reka Bentuk Kad Perniagaan (Business Car

desc:
I'm looking for a skilled designer to refine and produce a vector logo for my online presence. The logo will be used on social media, my website, and email signatures.

title: Classic Text-Only Logo Design
desc:
I’m refreshing my brand identity and need a timeless, typography-focused logo that captures a classic aesthetic—no icons, symbols, or abstract marks, just beautifully crafted text. Think elegant letterforms, balanced spacing, and a layout that feels instantly established yet still fresh today and five years from now.

You’ll take the brand name I provide, explore a few refined font directions, and fine-tune details such as kerning, weight, and subtle flourishes so the wordmark stands confidently on its own. A quick style rationale with each concept will help me understand your thinking and choose a final direction.

Acceptance & deliverables  
• 2–3 initial text-only concepts, with one round of revisions on the chosen option  
• Final artwork supplied as editable vector (.AI, .EPS) plus high-resolution PNG and PDF  
• Black/white and full-colour versions  
• Font details or outlined text, ensuring any typefaces used are license-safe

I primarily work with Adobe Illustrator files, so please design natively there for smooth handoff. If this sounds like your wheelhouse, I’m ready to see what you can craft.
task_type: Classic typography-only wordmark logo (B/W + colour, AI/EPS/PNG/PDF)
mcp_workflow: search_design (Express classic typography-only wordmark logo template, fillDescription=brand name) -> fill_text (client brand name) -> font_recommend (elegant classic letterforms) -> asset_add_file -> image_vectorize -> document_render_vector (AI/EPS + PNG/PDF, black-white and full-colour) -> asset_preview_file
inputs: Brand name to typeset (client will provide on start)
Explicitly text-only: no icons, symbols or abstract marks
Deliverables: editable vector .AI/.EPS + high-res PNG and PDF; black/white AND full-colour versions
Colour values to use — confirm; brief doesn't state
License-safe typeface preference (or outlined text)
note: Pure wordmark fits a template, but fill_text changes copy only — the exact font choice, kerning, weight and subtle flourishes the client wants are a human step in Express.

Typography-only, modern aesthetic

title: Real Estate Social Images
desc:
I have several high-quality renderings and site plans for a new commercial development and I want them turned into polished, single-image posts formatted specifically for Facebook. The core material is already finished; what I need is your creative touch to crop, balance colours, and lay out each image so it commands attention in the feed and looks cohesive with our existing brand style.  

You’ll receive the raw JPEGs/PDFs along with our colour palette and logo files. Using Photoshop, Illustrator or your preferred design tool, please:  
• optimise each image for Facebook’s recommended 1200×630 resolution,  
• keep text (if any) within the 20 % rule so reach isn’t penalised, and  
• export final files as both high-res PNG and an editable source file.  

I’m looking for a quick turnaround—once I hand over the assets, a first draft within two days and final revisions shortly after would be ideal. If you have ideas for subtle text overlays or light visual enhancements that elevate the posts without cluttering the architectural detail, feel free to propose them.  

Send over a couple of samples of similar marketing imagery you’ve produced, and let me know how soon you can start.
task_type: Architectural renders/site plans -> Facebook 1200x630 posts (crop, colour-balance, export)
mcp_workflow: asset_add_file (raw render JPEGs / site-plan PDFs) -> image_crop_and_resize (to Facebook 1200x630) -> image_apply_auto_tone / image_adjust_brightness_and_contrast / image_adjust_color_temperature (balance colours) -> [optional] search_design + fill_text for a light branded text overlay -> document_render_vector/asset_preview_file (export high-res PNG)
inputs: Raw renderings and site plans (JPEG / PDF) for the commercial development
Brand palette (hex) and logo files for cohesive styling
Output spec: Facebook 1200x630, high-res PNG, keep any text within the 20% rule
Any subtle text overlay copy desired (e.g. project name) + the editable source-file format expected
note: Crop, colour-balance and resize to 1200x630 are fully covered; if the client insists on a fully editable layered 'source file' and brand-exact overlay styling, a human would assemble that in Express/Photoshop.

title: Machine Branding Decal PSDs
desc:
I already have layered .psd templates ready to go and need them adapted into a full set of branding decals for our machine line. The task is straightforward: take my source templates, follow the existing style guide, swap in the correct colors, logos, and dimensions I will supply, and return clean, well-organized .psd files prepared for print.  

You’ll be working only in Photoshop; no other formats are required. Please keep every element on its own clearly named layer so the production team can make last-minute tweaks if needed. Color profiles must stay in CMYK, and resolution at 300 dpi.  

Once complete, send me:
• The updated, layered .psd file for each decal size I specify  
• A flattened preview .jpg so I can review quickly  

If you have previous experience producing control-panel or equipment decals, let me know—it will help me gauge how much guidance you’ll need on sizing and safety margin conventions. Other notes: 

Use .psd template files I will provide. Use the logo file that I will provide. Take logo, and add to the template files within the border. Make the logo as large as possible. Each background of the template file should be changed to the following colors:

Marquee, control panel and front bottom – lime green
Left side, right side – cyan blue

For the marquee and control panel, logo should be altered so that it runs horizontal similar to example files I will send you.
task_type: Adapt supplied .psd decal templates — swap logo + solid background colours (CMYK 300dpi)
mcp_workflow: asset_add_file (supplied layered .psd templates + client logo) -> image_select_by_prompt (select each template background) -> image_fill_area (fill marquee/control-panel/front-bottom = lime green; left/right side = cyan blue) -> place + image_crop_and_resize/rotate logo within the border -> asset_preview_file (flattened JPG preview)
inputs: Client's layered .psd decal templates and the logo file
Exact decal sizes required and per-panel colours: marquee/control-panel/front-bottom = lime green; left/right side = cyan blue (confirm exact CMYK values)
Logo placement rule: as large as possible within the border; rotated horizontal on marquee + control panel per example files
Output spec: layered, clearly-named PSD per size, CMYK, 300dpi, plus a flattened JPG preview
note: image_fill_area gives the solid lime-green/cyan backgrounds and the logo can be placed/scaled, but returning print-ready layered .psd files with each element on its own named layer (and the CMYK 300dpi profile) is a Photoshop step a human finishes.

title: Vibrant Social Media Reels Creation
desc:
I have a batch of raw clips that need to be turned into short, vertical social-media reels aimed at brand promotion. Each reel should instantly grab attention, keep viewers watching through tight pacing and clean transitions, and close with a memorable call-to-action that feels native to the platform.

What I will provide  
• Up to one minute of 1080p source footage per reel  
• Brand guidelines (logo, colours, fonts, tone of voice)  
• A rough content outline and caption copy  

What I need back  
• 15–30 second reels exported in 9:16 MP4 (H.264)  
• One thumbnail-ready still frame per reel  
• An editable project file (CapCut, VN, Premiere Pro or similar) in case tweaks are required  
• Royalty-free music and SFX neatly organised in the timeline  

Key expectations  
• Smooth transitions and precise rhythm that suit fast-scrolling feeds  
• On-brand graphics, text overlays and subtle motion effects  
• Clear, punchy audio mix that cuts through mobile speakers  
• Colours graded to match our existing Instagram aesthetic  

Acceptance criteria  
1. Final file passes Instagram and TikTok upload checks without flagging quality warnings.  
2. All assets align with the supplied guidelines; colour values and logo placement verified.  
3. No frame drops, audio pops or visible watermarks.  

Turnaround is three business days per reel once footage is handed over. If this first batch goes well, there will be a steady stream of similar work.
task_type: Raw clips -> 15-30s 9:16 brand reels (+ thumbnail still)
mcp_workflow: asset_add_file (raw 1080p clips) -> video_create_quick_cut (tight-paced highlight assembly) -> video_resize (9:16 MP4 H.264) -> media_enhance_speech (punchy audio) -> asset_preview_file (pull a thumbnail-ready still)
inputs: Up to ~1 min of 1080p source footage per reel
Brand guidelines: logo, colours, fonts, tone of voice; caption copy + rough content outline
Output spec: 15-30s, 9:16 MP4 (H.264); one thumbnail-ready still per reel
Royalty-free music/SFX choice; existing Instagram aesthetic to grade toward
note: video_create_quick_cut + video_resize deliver the paced 9:16 cuts and a still; on-brand text overlays/motion graphics, the editable project file and precise colour-grade to the IG look are manual edit steps.

To apply, please send: • 2–3 relevant editing samples • Estimated turnaround time

mcp_workflow: asset_add_file (raw footage) -> video_create_quick_cut (clean paced cut with transitions) -> video_resize (9:16) -> media_enhance_speech -> asset_preview_file

Target platforms (Reels / Shorts / TikTok) and desired length

title: "Graphic Designer for Full-Page Print Ad (Health/Medical Product)
desc: We're a Canadian medical device company looking for a graphic designer to create a full-page print ad for a trade publication. The ad promotes our colon hydrotherapy equipment and supplies. This is a design-and-layout job, not a reproduction. You'll be building the ad from a brief and supplied assets: laying out the product photography, applying our brand standards, setting the type, and composing the page so it reads cleanly. The copy is already written, and all assets (logo, product photos, style guide) will be provided to the hired designer. The full brief is attached. Please read it before applying. The final deliverable is a press-ready CMYK PDF at 300 DPI. We don't mind what software you use to get there, as long as the final file meets that spec. Strong print and prepress experience is essential, since the file has to be correct for print. Brand-matching matters too, so we're looking for someone who can follow an existing visual identity rather than invent a new look. The budget is fixed at $250 and includes up to two rounds of revisions.

Deliverable: full-page (8.5x11) ad, press-ready CMYK PDF at 300 DPI
Brand standards to follow (palette, type) per the supplied style guide
Up to two revision rounds; the full attached brief
note: An Express ad template can lay out the supplied photos + copy, but it can't match the exact brand style guide nor output a true press-ready CMYK/X-1a 300dpi PDF — final prepress and brand-exact typesetting are a human step.

title: Refine Existing Medical Emblem into Institutional Logo System (No Redesign)
desc: We are looking for an experienced brand identity designer to refine and professionalize an existing logo concept for a European medical organization. This is not a logo creation project. The core emblem concept is already approved and must be preserved. We are seeking refinement, professionalization, scalability improvements, typography integration, and creation of a complete logo system. Applicants who prefer creating entirely new concepts are probably not a good fit. Project Scope - Refine an existing emblem into a professional vector logo - Improve geometry, balance, scalability, and visual consistency - Create a complete logo system - Develop typography pairing and logo lockups - Ensure excellent appearance in both digital and print formats Required Deliverables - Primary logo - Horizontal logo version - Emblem-only version - Square/avatar version (LinkedIn, social media, email profiles) - Circular/seal version - Favicon version - SVG, AI, EPS, PDF, and PNG exports - Design Direction The final result should feel: - Professional - Institutional - Trustworthy - Timeless - Appropriate for a medical board, professional society, or European organization We are not looking for: - Startup aesthetics - Trendy logos - Gaming or technology branding - Creative reinterpretation without justification - Requirements Please provide: - Three examples of professional institutional logos or brand identities you have designed - An example of a project where you refined or improved an existing logo - A brief explanation of your design process A detailed design brief and reference materials will be shared with shortlisted candidates. Important: Please begin your proposal with the word: Scalpel This helps us identify applicants who have read the full description.
task_type: Medical Emblem — vectorize & build logo-system exports (no redesign)
mcp_workflow: asset_add_file (approved emblem artwork) -> image_vectorize -> font_recommend (institutional typography pairing) -> document_render_vector (SVG/AI/EPS/PDF/PNG; primary, horizontal, emblem-only, square, circular/seal, favicon) -> image_crop_and_resize (avatar/favicon sizes) -> asset_preview_file
inputs: The approved emblem concept artwork (must be preserved, not redesigned)
Required lockups: primary, horizontal, emblem-only, square/avatar, circular/seal, favicon
Export formats stated: SVG, AI, EPS, PDF, PNG
Institutional typography direction for the wordmark pairing — confirm
Exact brand colours (hex/Pantone) to preserve
note: Connector vectorizes the supplied emblem and renders the multiple format/size lockups, but refining geometry/balance and laying out the typographic logo-system lockups to an institutional standard is a human Illustrator step.

title: iPhone Silver Jewelry Photoshoot & Editing
desc:
I need a creative shooter-editor based in Nagpur who can capture my silver jewellery line with nothing more than a recent-generation iPhone and then polish every frame through AI-powered post-production. The look I’m after is minimalist and clean—crisp, shadow-controlled images on a pure or near-white backdrop that will slot straight into my online store without additional retouching.

Here’s the flow: we meet at my workspace (or a mutually convenient studio in the city), set up simple tabletop lighting, and photograph each piece from multiple angles. After the shoot, you’ll run the files through tools such as Lightroom Mobile, Photoshop’s Generative Fill, Luminar AI, or a similar platform to remove imperfections, balance tones, isolate the jewellery on white, and export consistent, web-ready crops.

Deliverables  
• 20 finished JPEGs (3000 × 3000 px, sRGB, <2 MB each)  
• Matching PNGs with transparent backgrounds  
• Original iPhone RAW/HEIC files plus layered PSDs or equivalent

Acceptance criteria  
• Uniform white background, no colour cast  
• Accurate metal tone and gemstone colour  
• Pin-sharp focus on all hero angles  
• Files supplied via download link within five days of shoot

If you have a compact lighting kit, a steady hand, and solid AI-retouch chops, let’s make these pieces shine.
mcp_workflow: asset_add_file (shot jewellery frames) -> image_remove_background -> change_background_color (pure white) -> image_apply_auto_tone -> image_adjust_color_temperature (neutralise cast / accurate metal tone) -> image_crop_and_resize (3000x3000 sRGB) -> asset_preview_file
inputs: 20 silver-jewellery shots, multiple angles per piece
Finished JPEGs at 3000x3000 px, sRGB, <2 MB each
Matching transparent-background PNGs
Acceptance: uniform pure/near-white background, no colour cast, accurate metal/gemstone tone, pin-sharp hero focus
Also requested: original iPhone RAW/HEIC + layered PSDs (connector outputs flattened PNG/JPEG, not PSD)
note: The in-person Nagpur iPhone tabletop photoshoot (and the RAW/HEIC + layered PSD deliverables) must be done by a human; the connector does the cutout, white background, tone/colour correction and 3000x3000 export on the supplied frames.

title: Refine Existing Logo Concept and Create Professional Vector Files
desc:
PROJECT DESCRIPTION

I have already created the final logo concept for my wellbeing and sound therapy brand, Sacred Resonance.

I am NOT looking for a new logo design or new concepts.

I am looking for an experienced logo designer to professionally recreate, refine and vectorise my existing logo while preserving the original concept and overall appearance.

I will provide:

• The current logo image
• A screenshot of the website hero section showing the logo in context

The objective is to create a polished, professionally constructed version suitable for long-term commercial branding use.

REQUIREMENTS

Please preserve the existing design concept, including:

• Typography structure
• Circle motif
• Three ascending dots
• Cradle/vessel shape
• Radiating rays
• Overall minimalist luxury aesthetic

I am looking for refinement rather than redesign.

The logo should be professionally balanced with:

• Clean geometry
• Perfect symmetry
• Consistent line weights
• Accurate spacing and alignment
• High-quality vector construction

LOGO VARIATIONS REQUIRED

1. Primary Logo
- Sacred Resonance wordmark with symbol beneath (similar to current layout)

2. Standalone Symbol
- Circle, dots, vessel and rays only
- The extended horizontal line used beneath the wordmark may be shortened and proportionally adjusted so the symbol works as a balanced standalone mark

3. Wordmark Only
- Sacred Resonance typography only

FILES REQUIRED

• Adobe Illustrator (.AI)
• SVG
• EPS
• Transparent PNG
• High-resolution JPG

Please provide files suitable for:

• Website use
• Social media
• Print
• Large-scale signage

STYLE

Luxury
Elegant
Minimalist
Timeless
Sophisticated
Calm
Wellbeing-focused

IMPORTANT

This is not a logo design project from scratch.

I am specifically seeking a designer who can professionally refine and vectorise an existing logo concept while maintaining its original character and symbolism.

Please include examples of previous logo refinement, vector logo, or brand identity work.

mcp_workflow: asset_add_file (current logo image) -> image_vectorize -> document_render_vector (AI/EPS/SVG/PDF/PNG/JPG) -> asset_preview_file
inputs: Current Sacred Resonance logo image + website hero screenshot for context
Preserve concept: wordmark typography, circle motif, three ascending dots, cradle/vessel shape, radiating rays, minimalist-luxury feel
3 variations: (1) primary (wordmark + symbol), (2) standalone symbol, (3) wordmark only
Outputs: AI, SVG, EPS, transparent PNG, high-res JPG
For web, social, print, large-scale signage

desc: Project Overview: We need a professional graphic designer to manually vector-trace an intricate, geometric luxury home builder logo from a reference image. The final logo must be flawless, with razor-sharp lines and precise symmetry. It must match a high-end, luxury aesthetic—flat 2D color block design with refined, thin typography. Design Requirements: Logo Mark: Replicate the thin-line geometric pitched roof encompassing an interlocking, symmetrical letter "M" with a diamond-like peak at the center intersection. Ensure perfect geometric symmetry and uniform line weights. Typography: Use a high-end, elegant, and thinner serif font for "MOZZAFIATO HOMES". Tracking (letter-spacing) should be clean and spaced intentionally for a premium look. Tagline: Position the tagline cleanly underneath the main logo lockup Required Deliverables & File Formats: Please provide a organized ZIP folder containing the logo in Pure White, Rich Gold/Bronze, and Dark Slate Grey across the following formats: Vector/Source Files (For Banners, Signage, and Adobe Illustrator): .ai (Adobe Illustrator Master Working File) .eps(Universal Vector Format for professional print shops) .svg (Scalable Vector Graphics for web icons and high-res screen displays) Raster Files (For Website, Presentations, Letterheads, and Business Cards): .png(High-resolution, 300 DPI, with transparent backgrounds) .jpg (High-resolution on solid white and solid dark backgrounds) Project Objective: The final files must be crisp and ready to plug directly into Squarespace web hosting, print layouts for luxury textured business cards, letterheads, digital presentations, and massive outdoor building banners without losing an ounce of quality.

title: Meta Ads Designer Needed for 3 Parenting Retargeting Static Creatives
desc: We are looking for a direct-response Meta ads designer to create 3 static retargeting ad creatives for TeenTalk, a parenting support system for parents of teens. These are not generic social media posts or cold ads. They are bridge creatives for a video-qualified audience — designed to move warm parents from recognition into our story-driven landing page. The audience has already watched 50%+ of our video ads. The goal is to move warm parents from recognition into action and bring them to the landing page with the right expectation. The creative should make the right parent feel: “This is about me, my teen, my pattern at home — and there may be a real way forward.” Target audience: - English-speaking mothers - Parents of a teen / preteen - Emotionally tired, relationship-driven, and aware there is a real problem at home - They do not want random parenting advice anymore - They are looking for a real system, not one more tip Final deliverables: - 3 static Meta ad creative concepts - Each concept delivered in 3 formats: 1) 9:16 — 1080×1920 — Stories / Reels 2) 4:5 — 1080×1350 — Feed 3) 1:1 — 1080×1080 — Square / flexible placements - Total: 9 exported final image files - Editable source files included if possible: Canva, Figma, Photoshop or Illustrator - Commercial-use / royalty-free visuals only - Clean, readable, mobile-first design - Small TeenTalk logo / purple round stamp in the top corner of each creative - 1 reasonable revision round included - If the final designs do not follow the approved brief, those issues should be corrected Design direction: - Clean, emotional, modern, readable - Serious, warm, credible — not cheesy - Use real emotional mother/teen imagery - Avoid overly staged “perfect family” images - Avoid childish design - Avoid generic therapy-clinic style - Avoid aggressive clickbait - Main text must be readable on mobile - Do not overload with too much text - Strong visual hierarchy: emotional visual, headline, short supporting line, CTA block, small TeenTalk mark Brand direction: Use a clean, premium, emotionally intelligent style. TeenTalk brand colors include soft teal / turquoise, purple, and warm yellow/gold CTA accents. The design should feel connected to a modern parent-support product, not like a generic parenting quote post. The full creative copy and detailed direction for all 3 ads will be provided after hiring. Budget: Up to $120 fixed price for 3 static creative concepts delivered in 3 formats each. To apply, please send: 1. 2–3 examples of Meta / Facebook / Instagram static ad creatives you designed 2. Confirmation that you can deliver 9:16, 4:5 and 1:1 versions 3. Confirmation that editable source files are included if possible 4. Your estimated delivery time 5. Please start your proposal with the word “TeenTalk” so I know you read the full brief

title: Coordinate DC Church Yard Bazaar
desc:

The space will be divided into sections for ladies’ clothes, kids’ clothes, shoes, antiques, kitchenware, plus areas for outside vendors (food, jewelry, craft stalls) and a children’s bouncy house.  

Your first assignment is to turn my ideas into a practical site plan and run-of-show that keeps traffic flowing, vendors happy, and neighbors undisturbed. That includes confirming local noise ordinances for amplified music, outlining any insurance requirements, and identifying the correct vendor, health-department and merchandise licenses for DC.  

Because I specifically want help with event layout and logistics, I’ll need a scaled map of the lot (I’ll supply dimensions on award), clear load-in/out routes, power or generator placement, waste stations, and a weather-contingency note.  

Marketing is next. I’ll handle the content; you design and schedule it: eye-catching flyers, directional signs for each sales section, and a week-by-week social-media rollout.  

To be considered, send a detailed project proposal describing your approach, timeline, and comparable outdoor events you’ve delivered.  

Key deliverables  
• Annotated site layout & logistics plan  
• Permit & insurance checklist for DC regulations  
• Hour-by-hour event schedule with staffing notes  
• Print-ready flyer, poster & directional-sign designs  
• Social-media posting calendar with sample copy  

I’m ready to move quickly and will answer any additional questions once we connect. Reach me here—or call/text 240-381-9540—so we can make this community bazaar a success.

title: Marketing Collateral & Brand Assets
desc: Project Brief: Marketing Collateral & Brand Assets Deliverables: Branded Presentation Folder, One-Page Service Overview, and Branded Sample Case Notes Template. 1. Project Overview & Branding Guidelines The organization provides premier, high-quality case management services, with a significant focus on complex motor vehicle accident (MVA) cases. Our work is professional, meticulous, and deeply supportive. All design deliverables must reflect this premium standard. For branding reference, color palettes, typography, and visual tone, please utilize our website. The aesthetic should be clean, modern, trustworthy, and polished. 2. Detailed Deliverable Specifications Deliverable 1: Branded Two-Pocket Presentation Folder • Purpose: To serve as the primary physical package handed to attorneys, medical providers, and clients containing our marketing materials, assessments, and reports. • Physical Specifications: Standard 9" x 12" presentation folder with two interior pockets. The right-hand interior pocket must feature standard die-cut slits to hold a business card. • Design Requirements: • Front Cover: Minimalist, clean, and high-impact. Must prominently feature the logo, brand colors, and core tagline/aesthetic. • Back Cover: Clean design containing essential company contact information (Website, Phone, Email, Office Address) and a clean layout. • Interior Pockets: Can utilize a complementary brand color or subtle geometric/abstract pattern that aligns with the website's visual assets. • Execution Note: Please deliver print-ready files (PDF/X-1a) Deliverable 2: One-Page Business Service Overview • Purpose: A high-end, scannable "leave-behind" sheet focused specifically on our Motor Vehicle Case Management Services. • Format: Single-sided or double-sided 8.5" x 11" flyer/sell sheet (Layout choice left to designer's discretion for optimal whitespace and impact). • Key Content Blocks to Include (Placeholder text is acceptable for draft): • Header: Company branding and a compelling title (e.g., Navigating Recovery: Expert Motor Vehicle Case Management). • The Company Advantage: A brief section highlighting our professional, meticulous approach to managing complex auto injury cases. • Core Services Bullet Points: * Coordination of medical care, rehabilitation, and specialized therapies. • Attendant care assessments and documentation. • Seamless communication between medical providers, legal teams, and insurance adjusters. • Comprehensive discharge planning and home modifications tracking. • Call to Action (CTA): Prominent placement at the bottom directing readers to contact us for referrals or consultations. • Design Style: Utilize clean grids, professional iconography for service bullets, and excellent typographical hierarchy to ensure it can be scanned in under 30 seconds. Deliverable 3: Branded Sample Case Notes Document (Refinement) • Purpose: A polished, professional document used to showcase a "mock case" to attorneys and adjusters, demonstrating the exceptional detail, clarity, and quality of clients clinical documentation. • Format: Multi-page 8.5" x 11" document template (Word or editable PDF format requested for final delivery). • Project Scope: We will provide an existing, real-world sample case notes document to use as a structural baseline. Your role is not to write content, but to completely overhaul the visual design, typography, and layout to transform it into a marketing-professional, highly branded corporate asset. • Design Requirements: • Header/Footer: Professional, unified running header featuring a clean variant of the logo. Footer should include page numbering ‬and a standard confidentiality notice. • Client Information Block: Convert the existing top-page data into a beautifully structured, clean table or grid to display fields such as Client Name, Date of Injury, Claim Number, Case Manager Name, and Report Date. • Body Layout: Upgrade the typography with distinct, professional styling for headings (e.g., Clinical Assessment, Care Coordination Activities, Progress Summary, Recommended Action Plan) to ensure maximum readability. • Visual Elements: Utilize subtle brand colors for section dividers, callout boxes, or table headers to turn standard clinical notes into an executive-level report.
task_type: Presentation Folder + One-Page Sell Sheet + Case-Notes Template
mcp_workflow: asset_add_file (logo + website brand refs) -> search_design (Express one-pager / folder template) -> fill_text (service overview copy) -> document_merge_data_layout / document_render_layout (case-notes template, client supplies baseline) -> document_convert_pdf (PDF/X print-ready) -> asset_preview_file

Deliverable 2: 8.5x11 one-page MVA case-management sell sheet (copy blocks provided as placeholder)
Deliverable 3: multi-page 8.5x11 case-notes template (restyle client's existing doc; Word/editable PDF)
Premium clean modern trustworthy aesthetic

title: graphic designer / print designer to recreate a two-sided DIN A5 package
desc: We need a professional graphic designer / print designer to recreate a two-sided DIN A5 package insert for Blausweta-Rasur. The current visual references are included in the asset package. Please do not simply upscale the AI drafts. The task is to rebuild the front and back side cleanly in Illustrator/InDesign as a proper print-ready layout with editable text, real vector logo, clean icons, correct bleed, and final PDF export for SAXOPRINT. Blausweta-Rasur is a German specialist retailer / online shop for shaving, grooming, razors, razor blades, care products and barber supplies. The shop serves private customers, barbers, salons and resellers. Blausweta-Rasur is already established on eBay and now wants to motivate marketplace customers to order directly in the official online shop. The insert should communicate: professional specialist retailer, reliable shipping, fair prices, direct shop advantages, loyalty/bonus points, referral benefits and shop-exclusive discount codes. Main goal: Customers who may know Blausweta from eBay or another marketplace should switch to the official online shop. Important campaign message: - Customers can save more directly in the Blausweta online shop. - First direct shop order after switching from eBay or another marketplace: 7% discount with code SHOP7. - Follow-up order / next direct shop order: 5% discount with code DANKE5. - Bonus points are collected additionally and can be redeemed. - Referral discounts are also available. Important: All discounts are percentages. Do not use € discount wording. Required deliverables: 1. Editable source file: Adobe Illustrator .ai preferred, or InDesign .indd with linked assets. 2. Print-ready two-sided PDF for SAXOPRINT, CMYK, PDF/X-4 preferred. 3. Front side and back side as separate high-resolution PNG/JPG previews. 4. All text must remain editable in the source file. 5. Use the official logo from the provided logo files. Do not trace/recreate the logo from the AI draft. 6. Use the clean warehouse header image without any baked-in logo. The logo will be positioned manually in the layout. Format / print setup: - DIN A5 flyer / package insert, double-sided, portrait orientation. - Final trim size: 148 × 210 mm. - Artwork size with bleed: 152 × 214 mm. - Bleed: 2 mm on every side. - Keep all important text/logos/icons at least 3 mm inside the final trim edge. Prefer 5 mm for safety. - Background images that touch the edge must extend into the bleed. - CMYK color mode. - Minimum image resolution: 250 dpi at final size, ideally 300 dpi. - Embed all fonts or convert to outlines in the print PDF. Design direction: Keep the style very close to the references: - Clean, modern, professional specialist retailer look. - White background with deep navy / purple accents. - No colorful mix. Stay in the Blausweta navy/purple world. - No gold, no green, no Trustpilot badge. - Avoid wedding/thank-you-card feeling. - Avoid playful hearts and handwritten romantic scripts. - The back side should feel like a professional shop benefit page. - The front side can remain warmer and personal, but still businesslike. Coupon details: SHOP7 = 7% welcome/switch discount for first direct shop order after switching from eBay or another platform. One-time use only. DANKE5 = 5% discount for the next direct shop order / follow-up order.
task_type: Blausweta DIN A5 Package Insert — rebuild 2-sided print
mcp_workflow: asset_add_file (logo files + clean warehouse header image + references) -> image_vectorize (icons if needed) -> search_design (Express A5 flyer template) -> fill_text (shop-benefit copy + codes SHOP7 / DANKE5) -> image_crop_and_resize (152x214mm w/ 2mm bleed) -> document_convert_pdf (CMYK PDF/X-4) -> asset_preview_file

title: Professional Vector Logo Recreation from a PNG Source File
desc: I have a brand logo (PNG) that needs to be cleanly redrawn from scratch in Adobe Illustrator or equivalent vector software. The original source file has been lost. The logo consists of two components: (1) an icon mark featuring two interlocking "P" letterforms, each with a barbell graphic cut through them, rendered in dark grey and red with gradient fills; and (2) a wordmark reading "PRO PHYSIQUE" in a condensed sans-serif style, with "PRO" in grey and "PHYSIQUE" in red. Requirements: -- Every edge must be perfectly smooth with no aliasing, fringing, or border artifacts -- All curves must be geometrically precise and symmetrical -- All corners must be clean and sharp -- All straight lines must be exactly 90 degrees or true diagonals — no drift -- Gradient fills on both icon shapes must be smooth and natural, fading cleanly to the shape edge with no outline or stroke of any kind -- Every letter in the wordmark must have squared-off terminals — no rounded, tapered, or angled stroke endings -- Delivered as a native AI or EPS file plus exported PNG at 2000x2000px minimum on transparent background -- Four separate layers required: grey icon shape, red icon shape, "PRO" wordmark, "PHYSIQUE" wordmark Please do not auto-trace the PNG. This is a full manual redraw. I will compare the result at high zoom and expect pixel-perfect edge quality. Again, this is an attempt to "recover" the perfection of our original logo file. To the naked eye, your deliverable should look identical to the source file Source files I will provide: original PNG (same as attached)
task_type: Logo Vector Recreation from PNG — 'PRO PHYSIQUE' (interlocking-P + barbell)

TIFF scans of the handwriting, sometimes split into two parts that need stitching
max print dimensions / target output size for the large uncompressed deliverable
deliver both an uncompressed large file and a downscaled JPG

Deliverables AI master, SVG, EPS, high-res print-ready PDF, PNG exports (transparent, multiple sizes). Smooth curves, no jagged auto-trace artifacts.

required output set: AI master, SVG, EPS, print-ready PDF, transparent PNG at multiple sizes
exact brand colours (Pantone/hex) to lock for colour accuracy across vehicle-wrap / large-format print
the word 'Wattz' in the proposal (client read-check)
note: image_vectorize is an auto-trace; the client explicitly requires manual hand-recreation with no auto-trace artifacts, so a human must redraw smooth curves/linework in Illustrator before final export.

title: BEAUTY RETOUCHER (Skin, Hair, Tone, etc)

Scope: Skin retouching — frequency separation, dodge & burn, blemish and texture cleanup while preserving real skin Hair work — flyaways, density, edge cleanup Color and tone unification across the set Working from Canon RAW files Volume & cadence: ~20 images for this first round, with more coming a regular basis for the right fit. We're treating this as a recurring gig for the right person — every time we shoot, we'll come back to you. Rate: $10–20 USD per image (depending on complexity). Includes up to 2 rounds of revisions per image. Timeline: We value retouchers who turn things around in a reasonable window — days, not weeks. If your typical delivery is 2–3 weeks after receiving files, we're not a fit. Deliverables: High-res TIFFs + JPGs (sRGB).
